programme.title: South Park: The Death of Eric Cartman

programme.title: South Park: Quest for Ratings

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Garrison's Fancy New Vagina

programme.title: The King of Queens: Thanks, Man

programme.title: The King of Queens: Santa Claustrophobia

programme.desc: Carrie reminds Doug why she makes all the decisions when he decides to buy a chainsaw.

programme.desc: Carrie befriends one of Doug's ex-girlfriends and discovers why he broke up with her.

programme.desc: Carrie gets angry when she catches Doug fantasizing about other women while he's sedated.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Multiple Plots
programme.desc: Arthur finds himself in a bit of a quandary when he tries to sell his extra burial plot.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Trash Talker
programme.desc: Doug disowns Deacon when he becomes friends with Doug's grade-school archenemy.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Precedent Nixin
programme.desc: Carrie plans to avoid her in-laws by staying at a hotel in Florida but it all goes awry.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Foe: Pa
programme.desc: Doug turns into a family mediator when Arthur embarrasses Carrie at a job interview.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Tank Heaven
programme.desc: Doug sabotages Carrie's attempts to hang out with her co-workers by scaring them off.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Altar Ego
programme.desc: Doug and the guys take a trip to try and stop Spence's ex-girlfriend from getting married.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Icky Shuffle
programme.desc: Doug agrees to team-up with Arthur for the senior centre's shuffleboard tournament.

programme.title: Movie: The Other Mother
programme.desc: Jackie tries not to let it bother her when her ex-husband's new wife bonds with her teenage daughter. But the stepmother turns the teen against Jackie and begins to lead her down a dark path.

programme.title: Beyond Reasonable Doubt: Murdered Bride
programme.desc: A case quickly goes cold for the LAPD in 1986 until 20 years later when DNA testing provides a new lead. The initial investigation searched for a male killer, but the DNA results reveal that they are looking for a woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Beyond Reasonable Doubt: The Green River Killer
programme.desc: In 1982 the first of over 50 victims of America's most prolific serial killer were discovered. After being at large for two decades, 'forensic microscopy' was used to link the women to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Common Thread
programme.desc: The year was 1984, and a serial killer was on the loose in Florida. Eight women had been found dead. At each crime scene, investigators found tiny red fibers, fibers they hoped would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Dirty Deed
programme.desc: Eileen and Derrick Severs disappeared from their home in the small village of Hambleton in Great Britain, and police found evidence which suggested foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Video Diary
programme.desc: When a gas station/ convenience store employee is found shot at point blank range, investigators find the entire murder has been caught on the store's videotape security camera.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing in Time
programme.desc: A young woman was reported missing after a fight with her husband. She was presumed to be dead and her husband was the prime suspect. Police were suspicious of a secondary suspect when he reported a suspicious fire in his car.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing Pearl
programme.desc: A woman doesn't return home, but a trail of blood is discovered leading to a basement.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Man's Best Friend?
programme.desc: When a young girl was found dead, her parents told police that she was killed by a dog.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Alibi
programme.desc: When 17-year-old Crystal Faye Todd was raped and murdered in her small town, one of her male acquaintances’ DNA matched semen at the crime scene. It raised the question, why would he volunteer for a DNA sample?

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Purr-fect Match
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within a Hair
programme.desc: In the summer of 1996, four women from South Bend, Indiana were sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Evidence
programme.desc: A couple was murdered during what looked like a drug deal gone awry. But police found no drugs in the home of the victims and there were no traces of the victims' blood on the clothing of the suspects. The victim's dog eventually led police to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Talking Skull
programme.desc: A mapmaker was surveying the grounds of a boy scout ranch when something caught his eye. At first, it appeared to be a turtle shell, but it proved to be a human skull.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Delivery
programme.desc: A serial bomber was waging a vendetta against the legal profession: A judge, two attorneys and even a courthouse had been targeted. Investigators used evidence from the bombs to lead them to the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Evidence
programme.desc: The shooting of a man during a hunting trip is reopened years after the incident, and the victim's hunting partner becomes a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Formula
programme.desc: The mother of a suspiciously murdered four-month-old was convicted, but an explanation for the death would come five months later from the most unlikely of sources: his newborn brother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer's 'Cattle' Log
programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called to retrieve a dead body, they do a background check on the victim. The trail leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skin of Her Teeth
programme.desc: A human skull retrieved from a watery grave reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate deep knife wounds. The teeth had been removed from the skull, apparently so the killer could keep the victim's identity a secret.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Line of Fire
programme.desc: A fundamentalist group starts attacking and robbing banks in the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A young doctor in a rural community is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting two of his female patients. DNA tests demonstrate that the doctor is innocent, but the women continue to insist that he sedated and raped them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The List Murders
programme.desc: For 18 years, a man who murdered his entire family successfully eluded the FBI. Investigators used art and forensic science to find the killer and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Raw Terror
programme.desc: The story of Damion Heersink, an eleven-year-old boy who almost died after eating an improperly cooked hamburger teeming with E-Coli, and the people who saved his life.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Common Thread
programme.desc: The year was 1984, and a serial killer was on the loose in Florida. Eight women had been found dead. At each crime scene, investigators found tiny red fibers, fibers they hoped would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Dirty Deed
programme.desc: Eileen and Derrick Severs disappeared from their home in the small village of Hambleton in Great Britain, and police found evidence which suggested foul play.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Charles Manson: The Devil's Work
programme.desc: This episode details the horror of Charles Manson's vicious attacks and explains how he was able to convince his hippie followers to brutally murder innocent strangers.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Son of Sam: The Duke of Death
programme.desc: He is among the most infamous serial killers in American history. From 1976 to 1977, David Berkowitz terrorized New York City under his creepy self-given moniker: the Son of Sam.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Son of Sam: I Am A Monster
programme.desc: In 1977, the city of New York was being stalked by a seemingly faceless serial killer known as, 'Son of Sam.' But after his final shooting took him to Brooklyn, a twist of fate and a little luck led to his capture.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Beaten by a Hair
programme.desc: Laura Houghteling left her Bethesda home and walked to the station to take a train to work. A peculiar strand of hair found in Laura's hairbrush enabled investigators to unravel the mystery of her disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crime Seen
programme.desc: After years in prison, Edward Honaker finally found someone who believed him, and was willing to pay for DNA testing which could prove he was innocent.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Evidence
programme.desc: The story of an investigator who captured a shoe impression made in snow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soft Touch
programme.desc: A case where a fingerprint left in a piece of cloth brought justice to a senseless murder.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Bearanoia
programme.desc: The Raneys rush to a failing homestead in Colorado where they find husband Don makes a 40-mile mountain commute each day, leaving his wife alone, terrified to leave the house because it's surrounded by bears and mountain lions.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Poisoned
programme.desc: The Raneys build the Rains a hillside garden, turn a cave into a goat fortress, and find uncontaminated water.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Nevada Thirst
programme.desc: In the Nevada desert, the Kondors' homestead has turned to dust. The Raneys discover rattler infested trailers, searing heat and sand storms, but when Marty finds the Kondors have no water, he gambles all to save the dying homestead.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: To Build and Protect
programme.desc: Marty builds a bridge across a creek to save a single mom and her daughter from rampaging moose. After a couple's dog is killed, the Raneys help protect them so they are not the next victims. The Raneys are shocked to find a bear den near their homestead.

programme.title: Treasure Island With Bear Grylls: Leaving Treasure Island
programme.desc: Host Bear Grylls returns to pick up the islanders, who reflect on how they coped with the brutal conditions and with each other. They reveal how the hidden cash motivated them to explore more of the island, helping provide the camp with food.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: To Build and Protect
programme.desc: Marty builds a bridge across a creek to save a single mom and her daughter from rampaging moose. After a couple's dog is killed, the Raneys help protect them so they are not the next victims. The Raneys are shocked to find a bear den near their homestead.

programme.title: Treasure Island With Bear Grylls: Leaving Treasure Island
programme.desc: Host Bear Grylls returns to pick up the islanders, who reflect on how they coped with the brutal conditions and with each other. They reveal how the hidden cash motivated them to explore more of the island, helping provide the camp with food.

programme.title: Dino Hunters: Curse of the Carnivore
programme.desc: Clayton Phipps and his team prepare to flip a 20,000-pound carnivore fossil out of the earth and onto a flatbed to get it to the lab for analysis. Meanwhile, Mike Harris hunts for a duckbill skull and Jared Hudson uncovers an ancient reptile.

programme.title: Dino Hunters: Shots Fired
programme.desc: Clayton must haul his 20,000-pound dinosaur fossil over 200 miles to a lab where it will finally be identified. The Harris/Bolan clan chases poachers off of their land and Jared makes a last-ditch effort to bring in some money this season.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Mystery of Dead Mountain
programme.desc: Braving the sub-zero conditions of Siberia, Josh Gates investigates one of the strangest and most brutal cold cases of all-time: the Dyatlov Pass Incident. Nine Soviet hikers died suspiciously. Sixty years later, no one knows how or why.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Siberia's Coldest Case
programme.desc: Josh Gates concludes his in-depth investigation of the Dyatlov Pass Incident. Taking on Dead Mountain's brutal conditions, Josh and two investigators re-trace the last steps of the hikers. A big discovery could finally solve the mystery.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Josh Gates Tonight: Mother Russia
programme.desc: Josh goes behind the Iron Curtain (while staying in his spare bedroom) to explore the cultures and mysteries of the USSR with celebrity guests and expert interviews.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Saint Croix Swipe
programme.desc: Ken Cage and Danny Thompson try to repo two planes from a much-feared criminal. Meanwhile, Mike Kennedy's on a mission to repo a plane being stripped by a stolen-parts ring. And Kevin Lacey gets cozy with a debtor in order to swipe his classic jet.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Ken Gets Played
programme.desc: A debtor suddenly swipes the helicopter that Ken and Danny were only seconds away from repossessing. Mike Kennedy enlists the help of his wife, Valerie, in a daring plot to seize a charter jet. Kevin is swarmed by FBI agents after an exhausting repo.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: No Safe Harbor
programme.desc: Mike and his wife go undercover to repo a go-fast boat. Ken and Danny bring in some talented friends to pull off a rare simultaneous triple repo, and Kevin attempts to swipe a deadbeat flight school's entire fleet of Cessnas.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Guns, Girls and Gamblers
programme.desc: Mike and his wife Valerie crash a high-stakes poker game to learn the location of a jet. Ken and Danny hunt down the luxury yacht of a womanizing sleaze bag. And Kevin has his life threatened when he attempts to repo a debtor's crop duster.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Hired Guns
programme.desc: Ken Cage and Danny Thompson repo a tour bus. Kevin Lacey faces armed guards on a nighttime repo, and Mike Kennedy is caught in a gun-smuggling operation.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Diving for Repos
programme.desc: In Florida, Mike Kennedy goes underwater to seize a seaplane. Meanwhile, Ken Cage and Danny Thompson chase a debtor who's fooling them with phony flight plans.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Two If by Air, One If by Sea
programme.desc: Ken and Danny seize a luxury yacht and the debtor comes after them full-force. Mike devises a solution to get even with the deadbeat who bought his favourite plane and stopped paying. Kevin and Heather find themselves in the middle of a mid-air nightmare.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Dredge Men Tell No Tales
programme.desc: With a massive storm about to hit Nome, Shawn and Ken push their operations to the brink to get one last score in. Emily gambles on untested ground. Kris battles bad attitudes. One dredge pushes too far into the storm, forcing its crew to abandon ship.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: I Was Gonna Gag
programme.desc: The unsafe conditions in extreme hoarder Floyd's home have been brought to the attention of Child Protection Services. He must clear his hoard or risk losing his three-year-old son.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Is That a Goat?
programme.desc: Retired U.S. Marine, Donny, has been to jail twice because of his hoard. Joyce sees comfort in her doll collection, but others see a creepy obsession.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Dr. Lee Nose Best!
programme.desc: Tony has large growths on his nose that impair his breathing. Kevin has a bump in his jawline that is a 'lady deterrent.' Marie has an unsightly lump on her forehead that makes her a hermit. Tommy's leg bump makes it difficult for him to work.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Pop Ups: The Curious Case of the Pooting Cyst
programme.desc: Diane has thousands of tumors all over her body that she feels have ruined her life. Will worries his shoulder lump will be ripped open at work. Anthony's daughters force him to get a lump examined. Kal Elle detests her varicose veins.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Pop Ups: The Last Unicorn
programme.desc: Louis is a veteran who is covered in scaly, dry skin that makes him feel like an alligator. Irais's kids are bullied because of the embarrassing growth on her head. Johnny's been living with a stubborn lump on his back for too long.

programme.title: Extraordinary People: Conjoined Twins: Inseparable
programme.desc: Carmen and Lupita are conjoined twins with distinct personalities sharing not only their body, but every moment of their young adult lives and the challenges they face as they fight for their independence, and prepare to for college life away from home.

programme.title: Extraordinary People: World's Smallest Woman: Meet Jyoti
programme.desc: Meet Jyoti Amge, the smallest woman in the world. At 24 inches tall and a mere 12 pounds, Jyoti is in the U.S. for work and to explore American culture. She also hopes to find a doctor for a serious health issue her two broken legs.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Pop Ups: The Curious Case of the Pooting Cyst
programme.desc: Diane has thousands of tumors all over her body that she feels have ruined her life. Will worries his shoulder lump will be ripped open at work. Anthony's daughters force him to get a lump examined. Kal Elle detests her varicose veins.

programme.desc: Louis is a veteran who is covered in scaly, dry skin that makes him feel like an alligator. Irais's kids are bullied because of the embarrassing growth on her head. Johnny's been living with a stubborn lump on his back for too long.

programme.desc: Carmen and Lupita are conjoined twins with distinct personalities sharing not only their body, but every moment of their young adult lives and the challenges they face as they fight for their independence, and prepare to for college life away from home.

programme.desc: Meet Jyoti Amge, the smallest woman in the world. At 24 inches tall and a mere 12 pounds, Jyoti is in the U.S. for work and to explore American culture. She also hopes to find a doctor for a serious health issue her two broken legs.

programme.title: Rattled: Nightmare Labour
programme.desc: Mariah's labour becomes a life or death situation. Julia and Ryan aren't ready when the first triplet heads home. Jamielynn gives Matt an ultimatum after speaking to his ex-wife. Aly and Josh take a chaotic road trip with their three toddlers.

programme.title: Rattled: Step Up or Ship Out
programme.desc: Mariah and Raymond's baby bliss is cut short when Raymond expresses doubts. The triplets' medical issues haunt Julia even after they've been released from the NICU. Autumn's labor brings her and Matthew closer. Matt confronts Jamielynn for seeing his ex.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: 10 Years Later and Busier Than Ever!
programme.desc: Brides and viewers have been 'saying yes' for 10 incredible years. When Grammy-nominated rocker Elle King arrives, Randy and consultant Shay have a dress disagreement. Then, bride Lisa needs a gown for a wedding with dolphins.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: We're Going to Say 'I Do' Underwater!
programme.desc: Omarosa of 'The Apprentice' is determined to find a colourful, dramatic gown for her big day. Jet-setting bride Valerie wants a dress fit for her lavish Ibiza wedding. Randy rescues bride Magaly who needs a dress for her underwater ceremony!

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: My Sisters are Picking Out My Dress!
programme.desc: Arlicia is letting her opinionated sisters plan her entire wedding, including choosing her wedding dress. Ameena has an unlimited budget and bridezilla tendencies. Karen is especially thankful to be shopping today after nearly losing her fiancé.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Not Hell Nor High Water
programme.desc: Randy is in Louisiana to save bride Kelli's big day after she lost everything in a devastating flood. Social media star Claudia Oshrey, aka Girl With No Job, brings sass to her appointment. Pnina Tornai feels the heat during Bridal Fashion Week.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: We Don't Do Anything Normal
programme.desc: Bodybuilder Melissa's dress vision is simple: it must show off her muscles. Shay may lose his cool with Randy as they help Kat, a bride with a tight budget. Jasmine wants a unique bridal look to match her one-of-a-kind wedding on top of the Grand Canyon.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: This Is My Fiancé...and This Is His Wife!
programme.desc: Bride Jennifer arrives at Kleinfeld with her fiancé - and his wife. Glori only wants the trendiest of gowns straight off the latest runway. Amanda needs to leave with a dress today for her wedding inside a chapel made of ice.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I Want My Daughter to Look Like a Sexpot

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life

programme.title: Storage Wars: All Along the Swatchtower
programme.desc: The buyers throw down in Koreatown. Dave expects to score some high-end merchandise, while Darrell struggles as he's never been to this area before. Mary fights for her lockers, and Jarrod may just push Brandi over the edge.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Up the Ante in El Monte
programme.desc: An auction in El Monte, CA has big lockers which means big money. Dave nabs a unit that shows he knows how to party and Rene tries to slice a bit of profit from a chilling find.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Return of the Mogul's Return!
programme.desc: At an auction in Montclair, Ivy rakes in the dollar bills, while Darrell keeps things old school and finds something that will launch him to new heights. Also, Brandi worries Jarrod's hangover will get in the way of buying, and Dave just won't stay away.

programme.title: Storage Wars: A Time to Kiln
programme.desc: The buyers head out to rainy San Jacinto, California, where Darrell discovers something that is music to his ears. Brandi and Jarrod find they need to team up with Barry if they want to make any money. Nabila tries to expand her territory.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Fu Dog Day Afternoon
programme.desc: The buyers head to the upscale retirement community of Laguna Hills, California.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Stakes, Buys, and Video Games
programme.desc: The buyers squeeze the City of Orange for some incredible lockers. Ivy scores a hole in one thanks to a unique landscaping tool. Darrell's keen eyes lead him to some upscale finds. Rene comes across a video game cache.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The School of Hard Knock-Knocks
programme.desc: Auctions in the college town of Rancho Dominguez have the buyers on the hunt for hip lockers with big scores. Darrell and Brandon are looking for quantity to feed their store, while Rene is targeting quality.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Auction Sesame
programme.desc: The buyers invade the best little city in the USA, Azusa, California.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Nutty Appraiser
programme.desc: Adelanto is the site of the Dotsons' return, and Dave tries to get his motors runnin'. Darrell stumbles over a curious collection, and Rene finally goes nuts.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Chairman of the Hoard
programme.desc: Rumours run wild in Orange, California when six lockers, owned by one tenant, go up for auction. Dave and Darrell vie for a unit with a $12,000 payday.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Young With the Gun
programme.desc: In Riverside, Jarrod and Barry are greeted by a mob of eager newbies. With their financial futures at stake, the buyers must choose to fight or befriend the crowd. Barry Weiss buys a 'mystery trunk.'

programme.title: Storage Wars: I Learned It From Watching You!
programme.desc: After hours in Huntington Beach brings out the family; Rene's daughter has a great eye; The Schulz/ Passantes add to their outdoor options; and the Gambler meets the predators.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Some Mo' Mr. Nice Guy
programme.desc: It's back to Moreno Valley, where Justin's congeniality earns him Rene's goodwill and a chance to level up; Darrell's tubular locker tests out OK.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Bright Lights, Big Biddies
programme.desc: Dave augments his inventory with a surprise medical device. Rene finds his furniture locker enlightening. Ivy finds some unexpected green.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Who Wants to Be a Mil-li-ner?
programme.desc: Costa Mesa offers Rene a bit of unexpected 'high' tech; Darrell goes on a cross-cultural haberdashery journey; Kenny kick-starts his career with some 'hot' pockets.

programme.title: Storage Wars: I'm the New Mogul
programme.desc: The buyers venture to Los Angeles, where they find themselves in a different kind of auction, called a vault auction.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Blame It on the Rain
programme.desc: The buyers follow the money to Santa Cruz, CA where they are caught in a torrential rainstorm.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Orange You Glad Dan Sold it Again?
programme.desc: A new buyer challenges both Barry and Jarrod, and makes off with a packed locker.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Mo' Money, Mo' Valley
programme.desc: Lockers go for big bucks as the buyers hit auctions in Moreno Valley, California. Ivy and Dave duke it out for a pair of units while Mary tries to avoid the shrapnel. One buyer hits it big with a twice-in-a-lifetime find that provides over $10K in profit.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Pop, Lock, and Auction
programme.desc: Ivy takes a chance on his own party locker; Brandi and Jarrod get back to basics; Rene gets advice on his presentation.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Ash Clown
programme.desc: The guys give customers an eye opening experience at a glasses store, and convince customers to pass illicit, and ridiculous, messages while shopping for groceres.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Catastrophe
programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr dodge shakedowns with the help of some strangers, and tonight's loser has a run-in at a party that leaves him down for the count.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crickets
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q and Joe head to Joey Fatone's hot dog joint to dish up weenies, and tonight's big loser performs a stand-up comedy routine but barely gets out alive.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: The guys kill time in a waiting room by sharing some TMI texts with strangers, then try to sabotage each other as the wingmen from hell at a dating event. Tonight's big loser gets a very special donation from one of the other Jokers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus, tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 8
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: The C-Team
programme.desc: Station 24 is forced to work with the buff and handsome C-Team and their new transfer Delilah. Terry buys a gas-guzzling truck and Eddie takes him for a ride.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q take some customers for a wild ride, and things get messy when they ask fellow shoppers for a hand. Plus, the big losers suffer a monster punishment that leaves them crushed.

programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr explain why they've been doused with water at the mall, and tonight's big loser plays a pirate but won't find any rum in his cup.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Three Men and Your Baby

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Training Day
programme.desc: The guys go to a supermarket with bells on and try to reminisce with strangers in the park. Plus, tonight's three losers are put through an epic trial by fire.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.desc: House is recruited by the CIA to treat an agent with an illness as mysterious as his last assignment. With limited information to go on, House uses some unorthodox methods to try to crack the code and determine a diagnosis.

programme.title: House: Ugly

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Ready to Launch
programme.desc: The Chrisleys head to Tampa for Savannah's fashion line launch at HSN. Todd and Julie help Savannah overcome her on air jitters, and Nanny gets Chase in trouble at a casino.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Training Faye
programme.desc: Julie gets frustrated when the family use Chloe's birthday as a reason to compete against each other. Nanny Faye gets more than she bargained for when Todd insists on being her trainer.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Todd and Pony Show
programme.desc: Todd becomes Faye's assistant after finding out that she's been making Julie to run all of her errands. Meanwhile, Savannah gets over-excited when Chloe shows an interest in horseback riding.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: A Date with Destiny
programme.desc: A newly single Chase gets caught off guard when his family sets him up on a double blind date. Meanwhile, Todd struggles with how to handle Grayson's latest homework assignment.

programme.desc: It will be a hardcore competition between veteran Indian chef Thomas John when he takes on personal chef Gail Arnold. Chef Bobby Flay has two excellent friends in the front row to watch, The Barefoot Contessa, Ina Garten, and Neil Patrick Harris.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Midwest Swing

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Flying Aubergines

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Homeland

programme.title: Food Paradise: All Wrapped Up
programme.desc: From ice cream- and cereal-stuffed burritos in LA to a deep-dish pizza wrapped in a whole other pizza in Chicago, these restaurants prove that good food is even greater when it comes in a tasty package.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Totally Unexpected
programme.desc: From a password-protected cheeseburger in Chicago to top-notch barbecue in at a Walla Walla gas station, we try the most delicious dishes at the most surprising places across the country.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Ooey Gooey Greatness
programme.desc: From majorly melty mac and cheese to fudgy, chewy triple chocolate cookies, diners are living the gooey good life at these restaurants across the nation.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Soups and Sandwiches

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: College-Town Champs
programme.desc: Guy visits Columbus, Ohio for pierogies and a barbeque truck and Boulder, Colorado for noodles and chicken from a Thai restaurant.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Kinds of Comfort
programme.desc: This trip, Guy dives into all kinds of comfort cooking. In Phoenix a funky joint stacks up barbecue fries and a new spin on chilaquiles. In Boulder a pizza place loads up the pies with their meatball grinder.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Poutine, Pizza and Pork
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri travels the country diving into some meaty masterpieces starting at a spot in Longmont, Colorado, that serves craft beer and primo pub grub like their piled-high poutine burger.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Grab and Grub
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's diving into joints where you can literally grab all kinds of grub, starting with a Chicago-style spot in Tucson, Ariz., firing up deep-dish pie and twisted-up breadsticks.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Pork To Pasta
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's diggin' into everything from pork to pasta on this trip. In Chicago, a real-deal Italian spot with righteous ravioli and dynamite deep dish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Sandwiches To Stroganoff
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is digging into all kinds of hearty meals on this trip. In San Antonio, an East Coast-Texas deli mash-up pilin' up smoked meat sensations. Plus a funky joint making big-time empanadas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sausage, Shawarma and Scaloppini
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's travels take him to a unique little Italian restaurant in Wilmington, Del. that serves unbelievable arancini and veal scaloppini. A Middle Eastern street food spot in San Diego features some phenomenal falafel and shawarma.

programme.desc: Big weather hits the fleet, and an unruly deckhand forces captain Sean Dwyer to enforce his dad's law. Elsewhere, Josh and Casey square off, Sig grinds his crew and Keith struggles with new greenhorns.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Fire at Sea: Part One
programme.desc: Alone on the water, days from land, the Northwestern catches fire. Meanwhile, a family emergency forces Johnathan to make a desperate move and Josh Harris' judgment is tested.

programme.title: Legends of the Deep: Search for the Sunken UFO
programme.desc: Celine and Fabien Cousteau use cutting-edge technology to investigate the most credible UFO sighting in history, when a strange alien craft was spotted crashing into the ocean. What they discover might reveal hard evidence of extraterrestrial contact.

programme.title: Legends of the Deep: Mystery of the Spy Sabotage
programme.desc: A dangerous stretch of water in the Mediterranean is the resting place of an infamous sunken ship, and using the latest tech, Celine and Fabien Cousteau investigate if it was deliberately attacked by spies on a top-secret mission.

programme.title: Legends of the Deep: Bermuda Triangle: The Secret Shipwreck
programme.desc: Celine and Fabien Cousteau use cutting-edge tech to hunt for a long-lost shipwreck in the Bermuda Triangle, and if their top-secret clues are right, they might uncover new evidence that explains the disappearances in this deadly and mysterious place.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Cold Water Mystery
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade sets out to investigate reports of strange, alien species in the water surrounding the remote Aleutian Islands.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Alaska's Lost River Kings
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to Alaska to investigate the disappearance of the majestic king salmon. His search will take him through the heart of grizzly bear territory, remote native communities and ultimately the Pacific Ocean as he follows a trail of evidence.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Return of the Outback Beast
programme.desc: Jeremy heads to Australia to investigate a terrifying underwater attack by a beast in a remote outback river. As his investigation unfolds, Jeremy is faced with the exciting possibility that a giant predator he once thought extinct could be back.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Italy's Lake Monster
programme.desc: The Lake Garda monster has been described as a huge, humped bear - half snake, half dinosaur. Jeremy travels to northern Italy to investigate and discovers that these picturesque waters could be hiding several enormous beasts.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: South Africa's Legendary Beast
programme.desc: A recent sighting in South Africa of a bizarre beast - half human, half fish - draws Jeremy into the story of creature with ancient origins and a fearsome reputation.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Ice Age Predator
programme.desc: Tales of monstrous, man-sized pike have persisted in Europe for generations. Now, Jeremy Wade is on a journey to catch this prehistoric monster, starting in the lakes of Ireland and leading to unfished waters on the edge of the Arctic Circle in Sweden.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Jurassic River Beast
programme.desc: Tasmania is home to species found nowhere else on earth, including a colossal freshwater beast capable of breaking a person's arm. Jeremy Wade will venture into the island's dense, eerie forests in search of this formidable creature.

programme.title: River Monsters: Killer Snakehead
programme.desc: Angler, Jeremy Wade sets his sights on an aggressive far eastern predator that's now invading America's backyards. Accused of homicide and said to breathe air and crawl on land, the snakehead is a monster that sounds more like a gangster than a fish.

programme.title: Movie: The Perfect Match
programme.desc: A playboy is surprised to find himself wanting more from his casual relationship.

programme.title: Movie: House Party 2
programme.desc: A young man throws a house party in an effort to raise tuition money for university.

programme.title: Movie: House Party

programme.title: Martin: Suspicious Minds
programme.desc: When Martin's CD Walkman disappears, he accuses all of his good friends of taking it.

programme.title: Martin: Love Is in Your Face (Part One)
programme.desc: Gina is offered a job in New York and Martin, taking advice from Stan, tells her to take it.

programme.title: Martin: Love Is in Your Face (Part Two)
programme.desc: With Gina out of his life, Martin reconsiders his decision to let her go to New York to move on with her life, and he sets out to win her back.

programme.title: Martin: Arms Are for Hugging
programme.desc: Martin and Gina admit that they are fighting and arguing too much, so they seek the help of a church Minister for counselling.

programme.desc: T, Kim and Nikki decide to try making money by selling T-shirts with a catchy slogan.

programme.title: The Parkers: Election 2000

programme.title: House of Payne: Curtis Sings the Blues

programme.title: House of Payne: Firestorm
programme.desc: A routine fire becomes C.J.'s worst nightmare. Meanwhile, Ella recommends a book to Miranda and Claretha and finds out why it's such a hot seller.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Where There's a Will There's a Way
programme.desc: Will and Carlton begin their first year at college by moving into their own apartment.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Where There's a Will There's a Way
programme.desc: Will and Carlton begin their first year at college by moving into their own apartment.

programme.title: Martin: Guard Your Grill

programme.title: Martin: Yours, Mine and Ours
programme.desc: When the small screen TV in the apartment needs replacing, Martin is enticed into buying a big-screen TV, and uses the money from Martin and Gina's combined checking account to purchase it.

programme.title: Martin: I Don't Have the Heart

programme.title: Martin: Crunchy Drawers
programme.desc: Martin has a dream in which he's attracted to Pam.

programme.title: The Parkers: Turkey Day Blues
programme.desc: The gang winds up in a homeless shelter on Thanksgiving Day after Nikki and Kim argue.

programme.title: Black-ish: Being Bow-racial
programme.desc: Bow must address unresolved feelings about her own biracial identity when Junior brings home his first girlfriend, who happens to be white.

programme.title: Black-ish: Nothing But Nepotism
programme.desc: Bow urges Dre to use his connections and secure Zoey a fellowship, but he doesn't want his daughter relying on nepotism. When Bow finds Zoey a place at the hospital, Dre balks at the idea and successfully pulls some strings at Teen Vogue.

programme.title: Black-ish: Just Christmas, Baby
programme.desc: Zoey is college-bound, so Dre sets out to create the best family Christmas ever, even having Johan and his best friend Gigi over for the celebration. Meanwhile, Bow babysits Gigi's newborn and remembers just how difficult mothering a baby is.

programme.title: Black-ish: Their Eyes Were Watching Screens
programme.desc: When Diane stumbles onto some websites that give her more than she bargained for, Dre and Bow must take action. Concerned that the internet is corrupting their children, Dre and Bow decide to make their home an internet free-zone.

programme.title: Black-ish: Lemons
programme.desc: The nation is still reeling after the outcome of the presidential election, and tensions are particularly high at Dre's work. Much to his frustration, they haven't been able to get anything done since election night eight weeks ago.

programme.title: Black-ish: Good Dre Hunting
programme.desc: Bow convinces a begrudging Dre to try therapy, and he learns how to cope with his anger issues. Meanwhile, Johan becomes a life coach to the kids.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Name Game
programme.desc: Dre and Bow have a gender reveal party, and Dre is thrilled because it's his turn to name the baby. He decides on a culturally significant name that Bow and Ruby aren't a fan of.

programme.title: Black-ish: I'm a Survivor
programme.desc: When Dre goes back to Compton for a funeral, he is reunited with his old crew and struggles with survivor's remorse for the friends he left behind. Meanwhile, Bow becomes self-conscious when Ruby criticizes her parenting style.

programme.title: Black-ish: One Angry Man
programme.desc: Dre is forced to participate in jury duty after Junior responds to the summons that was thrown away. The case is supposed to be open and shut, but when Dre sees that the defendant is a young African American, he feels responsible to give him a fair trial.

programme.title: Black-ish: ToysRn'tUs
programme.desc: Janine gives Diane a white Girlstory doll for her birthday, and when Bow tries to return it for a black doll, she is shocked by the limited options offered.

programme.desc: The CSI's continuing investigation of serial murderers takes an unexpected turn.

programme.desc: A dad and his two adult daughters are ready to move on in life, but they're struggling to sell their family home. Leslie and Lyndsay work to transform their dated, 1990s property into a coastal retreat that will attract a brand-new family.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Moving Sale Makeover
programme.desc: A couple is moving out of state for work and needs Leslie and Lyndsay's help to sell their home. The twins revamp their outdated ranch with a modern farmhouse style designed to reel in buyers who love to entertain.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Rough Rambler Reno
programme.desc: A young family has outgrown their home, but major exterior issues and a dark interior are keeping it from being sold. Leslie and Lyndsay brighten and repair the outdated rambler, but pricing it right will be difficult with no comps in the neighborhood.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: No Appeal to Curb Appeal
programme.desc: A couple that's desperate to sell their bungalow after receiving no offers calls on real estate experts and twins Leslie and Lyndsay. The home needs some love to make it sellable, but the stakes are raised when the twins invest money to make improvements.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Starter Home Transformation
programme.desc: A sister who is trying to help sell her brother's property has had no luck finding a buyer. Lyndsay and Leslie come to the rescue by updating the small starter home with Scandinavian design elements and an outdoor oasis that's perfect for entertaining.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Rental Property Reno
programme.desc: A contractor is desperate to sell his rental property that's a real wreck. When he's tempted to overspend on the renovation, twins Leslie and Lyndsay help steer Jeff toward a more budget-friendly makeover with an eclectic style.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Flea Bag Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a house in Rowland Heights, CA. This three-bedroom, two-bath house should be a quick flip, but once they get inside they find big problems that will take all their skills to fix.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Risky Business: Turf Wars
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina team up with their friend Pete De Best on a house in Yorba Linda, CA. They've flipped houses with Pete and have had success, but he's a major penny pincher, and they must convince him that you have to spend money to make money.

programme.title: Flipping Across America: Gone to the Dogs
programme.desc: In this flipping competition that has gone to the dogs, Flip or Flop: Aubrey and Bristol try to overcome a home's canine stench, while Page and DeRon work to turn a duplex that was a literal dog house into a single family home.

programme.title: House Hunters: Hustle and Bustle Versus Peace and Quiet
programme.desc: Florida newlyweds can't agree on whether they should go with her dream of a vintage charmer in the heart of St. Petersburg, or his wish for a move-in ready house in the suburbs.

programme.title: House Hunters: Chicago High-Rise vs. House in the Burbs
programme.desc: A Chicago couple's looking for a bigger home to raise their son, and to have their large extended family stay with them. She's a city girl at heart and wants to live in another high- rise but he'd rather get a big house in the suburbs.

programme.title: Design At Your Door: PG-Rated Fun

programme.desc: A mysterious ghost girl follows a nurse home, a security guard discovers he is not alone at an abandoned hospital and an oncology nurse see glowing orbs and shadowy hooded figures while working at a city hospital.

programme.title: Haunted Hospitals: The Cruel Nurse/ When Hell Freezes Over

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New York City: Not Feelin' Jovani

programme.desc: Apollo 12 astronauts bring back something alive from the moon and NASA tracks an asteroid heading towards Earth but makes a shocking discovery: it's not an asteroid, but an object that's artificial in nature.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Secrets of the Alien Signals
programme.desc: NASA begins a strange experiment to communicate with dolphins, and experts investigate if it's a prelude to making alien contact. However, some fear that such a discovery could have apocalyptic consequences.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Planet of the Metal Aliens
programme.desc: After a strange discovery confirms that life is possible on its surface, scientists begin to investigate if a nearby exoplanet could be home to an alien civilization.

programme.title: Outrageous Acts of Science: Power Hungry
programme.desc: We've found the most power hungry clip makers on the web. Brace for destruction as they harness lightning, fire and ice to blow the lid off the internet.

programme.title: Outrageous Acts of Science: Kings of Carnage
programme.desc: Featuring anvil shooting, a man called 'Thundershin', MRI destruction, demolition fail and jumping out of a chopper without a parachute.

programme.title: Outrageous Acts of Science: Zeroes to Heroes
programme.desc: Featuring the Mexican firework hammer, the tongue/ lamppost fail, high dive disaster, superglue prank and the most scared man on the internet.

programme.title: Outrageous Acts of Science: Like a Boss
programme.desc: Features a record-breaking butt skipper, a woman restraining four motorcycles, and the fastest downhill bike ride ever. These guys reveal the very best of human ingenuity and perseverance by doing it like a boss.

programme.title: Outrageous Acts of Science: Man vs. Nature
programme.desc: We're pitting Man vs. Nature. Find out who comes out on top when a glass-breaking gorilla and a speed-racing sea lion face off against a snowman in the desert and an underwater wheelchair.

programme.title: Outrageous Acts of Science: Homemade Hotshots
programme.desc: Counting down the most amazing and dangerous home experiments. Mixing electricity with swimming pools, racing supercharged golf carts and setting off homemade gunpowder.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secret of Supervillain Island
programme.desc: On a strange island off the coast of Croatia, the mysterious ruins of a long-abandoned hideout look like they once belonged to a James Bond supervillain, and new discoveries reveal why it was built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Thing on Hell Mountain
programme.desc: A massive, alien-like fortress built into a mountainside is the central node to a network of pipelines that race outwards like tentacles; behind-the-scenes access reveals the secrets of why this strange complex was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Mountain of Madness
programme.desc: A wealthy executive comes into conflict with his neighbors when he forbids them access to his extensive lands. One local handyman fights to keep the roads and trails open for all, a struggle that ends when one man lies dead.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Deadly Duplex
programme.desc: After an early retirement, a man buys a duplex and rents half of it out to a troubled family. With the help of his gun, he sends an abusive husband packing and sets his sights on the wife.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: House of Shards
programme.desc: A childish joke between neighbouring kids turns into an all-out war when the adults get involved. For some, the laughter will end forever.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Is This the Night I Die?
programme.desc: Cindy Best's friends and family all thought she was crazy when she told them her suspicion about her husband, Karl Karlsen. But Cindy was determined to take matters into her own hands and prove her husband was a killer.

programme.title: Devil Among Us: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: A sniper shooting on an Alaskan highway leaves a young man dead and a community running scared. As one family grieves, another becomes hell-bent on revenge as they formulate an audacious plot.

programme.title: American Monster: Twice Shy
programme.desc: Carol-Ann and James Sharp seem like a match made in heaven, but behind the veneer of happiness hides a monster in plain sight. Loved ones close to the couple sit down for the first time on camera to make sense of a murder that none of them saw coming.

programme.title: Devil Among Us: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: A sniper shooting on an Alaskan highway leaves a young man dead and a community running scared. As one family grieves, another becomes hell-bent on revenge as they formulate an audacious plot.

programme.title: American Monster: Push Record
programme.desc: In Colorado, second-time spouses Harold and Toni Henthorn seem to dote on their young daughter and each other, until their idyllic life is shattered by a deadly hiking accident. Their happy home videos conceal a deadly predator who nearly escaped justice.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Said There Were More of Them
programme.desc: It never occurred to Shirley Gaskins that the father she adored could be one of the most prolific serial killers out there, but, as more people vanished without explanation, she was finding it harder to deny.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: There's Something About Mary Lynn
programme.desc: A single mom is stalked by her ex-boyfriend's son for 22 years.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Final Fantasy
programme.desc: An introverted high school student finds a soulmate in the new boy in town. They share a passion for fantasy and comic books, but their romance is jeopardized when she goes to college and he cannot contain his jealousy.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Killer-In-Laws
programme.desc: These Deadly Women satisfied their blood lust within the family.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Sleeping With the Enemy
programme.desc: When these women exposed their true selves, their men found out they'd been 'Sleeping With The Enemy.' A beauty queen tried to free herself from family duties; an accountant's tryst turned deadly; and a valedictorian made sure her man coudn't leave.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Fatal Obsession
programme.desc: These deadly women were consumed by obsessions that overtook their minds and their lives.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Mad or Bad
programme.desc: Some women tread a fine line between anger and insanity. A bondage queen punishes her rival, a teenager wreaks fiery revenge, and a doctor prescribes a lethal cure for her problems.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Cold as Ice
programme.desc: Some women need to dominate, even if they have to kill. An Iowa divorcee stages a home invasion; Jealousy and alcohol prove a lethal mix for a UK mom; and a drug kingpin won't let anyone stand in her way. These Deadly Women are as 'Cold as Ice.'

programme.title: Deadly Women: Girl on Girl
programme.desc: They may be the fairer sex but when they clash it can be downright brutal. An abusive mother takes drastic steps to keep custody of her child; a small town gossip sparks a murderous grudge match; and a teen bully makes a shocking move.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Evil Guardians
programme.desc: When a Missouri mom uses her children for money, a Texas mom's becomes delusional, & an Australian gives her son a watery grave, it's clear they lack motherly love.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Mr. & Mrs. Fantastic
programme.desc: When elderly couple Charles and Grace Lewis vanish from the family farm along with their pickup truck, their children realize that something is terribly wrong. As word spreads, fear envelopes the quiet religious community of Bonne Terre, MO.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Rumor Has It
programme.desc: Nestled halfway between Bangor and the Canadian border, Webster Plantation has a population of less than 70 people. When two of its residents, Michael and Valerie Miller are found brutally murdered in their home, fear overwhelms everyone in town.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Lord of the Rockies
programme.desc: Residents of Guffey, Colorado cherish their tiny mountain outpost for one reason - the peaceful Rocky Mountain surroundings. That peace is shattered one January night when Carl and JoAnna Dutcher are massacred alongside their grandson, Tony.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Dorothy Did Right
programme.desc: The murder of a beloved church lady sends the easy-going town of Georgiana, Alabama into a whirlwind. In a community where local gossip is rarely exciting, the rumors spreading across town have detectives struggling to separate fact from fiction.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Hell
programme.desc: War descends into hell. The battlefield becomes a slaughterhouse. After 16 months of fighting, five million men are dead. Despite this, neither side has gained any ground until a new and terrifying machine rolls onto the battlefield: the tank.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Rage
programme.desc: People have had enough of the war and uprisings are brewing. German submarine attacks provoke the Americans, but they arrive too late to prevent the Battle of Passchendaele.

programme.title: Apocalypse: World War One: Deliverance
programme.desc: All seems lost for the Allies. The Italians are defeated at Caporette, and a Bolshevik Russia pulls out of the war. But the American reinforcements are decisive, and the Allies emerge victorious.

programme.title: Nazis vs. Aliens
programme.desc: The incredible story of how Nazi scientists and UFOs combined to create technology that changed the world.

programme.title: Hidden History of the Moon Landing
programme.desc: The amazing, untold story of how President Lincoln initiated a series of events that culminated in the moon landing.

programme.title: Mafia vs. KKK
programme.desc: The amazing story of the hidden war between two of the United States most violent groups, the mafia and the Ku Klux Klan.

programme.title: Hollywood vs. Commies
programme.desc: The amazing story of how Hollywood took on Communism and played a key role in winning the Cold War.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Demon Doctor
programme.desc: Known for his dubious medical practices and shady financial deals, the Nazi occupation liberated Dr. Marcel Petio's murderous instincts, enabling him to embark on a shocking killing spree.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Godfather of London
programme.desc: Billy Hill was the most powerful Kingpin in Britain's post-war underworld, but the secret behind Hill's empire is little known.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Road to Burma
programme.desc: The Empire of Japan begins to conquer South East Asia. The Allies attempt to block the empire's aggressive expansion, but ruthless tactics by Japan only help to further their war effort.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mao: China's Chairman of Death
programme.desc: Mao Zedong, Supreme Leader of Communist China for 30 years, is one of the 20th Century's most ruthless tyrants. His reign of cruelty and revenge, transforms him to a position of authority so great, his personality cult remains to this day.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: Bringing Down the Walls

programme.title: Aloha Builds: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: A couple reaches a standstill during demolition, so David and Michelle come to the rescue to save their remodel.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: Ohana New Kitchen

programme.title: Aloha Builds: Halfway House
programme.desc: Michelle and David are challenged to fix a previous remodel that has left half of a home stuck in the 1980s.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Save It or Sell It
programme.desc: A couple loves Lewes and the cheerful home they own there, but their two daughters have outgrown the space. Now, the family's torn between selling the house or renovating it. Marnie tries to expand the home without losing its historic charm.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Boxed in at the Beach
programme.desc: Chris and Danielle's cottage in Bethany Beach, Delaware, is too cramped for their family of five. Marnie attempts to convert the wasted deck space and bare backyard into a spacious beach escape.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Bethany Beach
programme.desc: Jim and Tina have purchased a 1930s beach cottage in Bethany Beach, Delaware for their family. The house has a few charming touches, but a lot of aesthetic and structural issues.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Beauty and the Beach
programme.desc: A townhouse overlooking Bethany Beach is dated and awkward. Marnie attempts to update the home, but the discovery of water damage may affect her ability to make the most of its dazzling view.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: From Soaked to Saved
programme.desc: A couple has invested in a 50-year-old abandoned home in Dewey Beach, Delaware. They decide to hand the reins over to Marnie in the hopes she'll turn the fixer-upper into a safe vacation destination for their two boys.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: No Longer Grandma's House
programme.desc: After inheriting his family's Cape Cod cottage in Bethany Beach, Delaware, a man realizes it looks like grandma still lives in the home. Marnie plans to bring the house up to date by ripping out the old wood paneling and more.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Big Family, Bigger Beach Home
programme.desc: A couple's Dewey Beach home has become cramped and in need of reconfiguration. With a new open-concept layout, Marnie aims to preserve the integrity of the house while improving the flow and maximizing space.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Open-Concept Canal Home
programme.desc: Karen's 30-year-old canal-side home has an enormous backyard and attractive deck area, but its choppy 1980s layout and awkward additions aren't functional for entertaining. Marnie has big plans for it including an indoor and outdoor kitchen renovation.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Tough Times in Topsail
programme.desc: A beach-loving couple looks for a forever home in Topsail, North Carolina, and finds a property with potential that needs major renovations.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Florida Retreat
programme.desc: Vicky and Rome are looking to trade in the hustle and bustle of life in New York for the sun and surf of Flagler Beach, Florida. They find an oceanfront property perfect for their new lifestyle, but it's in need of a major overhaul.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Washington Coast Charmer
programme.desc: A couple that's looking for a forever home for their family of four finds a charming house that needs a major upgrade in Grays Harbor County, WA.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Good Ol' Reno in Gulf Shores, Alabama
programme.desc: A couple searches for a beachfront vacation spot in Gulf Shores, AL. They find a house in their dream location but the dated home needs a brand-new look to fit their colorful style.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Meat-Fest
programme.desc: Food Network stars including Duff, Michael Symon, Ted Allen and Cat Cora bring on the meat! Leg of beast, roast suckling pig, lamb shank, even a tri-tip sandwich, it's meat that can't be beat.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Chocolate
programme.desc: Food chefs Alton, Duff, Tyler and Claire discuss chocolate recipes.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Hot and Spicy

programme.desc: Noah Cappe starts at the Delaware State Fair, where he'll eat the very stately Delaware Dog, a hot dog loaded with scrapple. Then, he'll try to tackle the funnel cake-filled Frankenfunnel Burger and the octopus-loaded Octotaco.

programme.desc: The pups lose an important part of Bob's presentation during Take Your Dog to Work Day. Bob, the pugs and Keia run out of popcorn at their first slumber party.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Chin Up, Pups / The Wind Beneath My Paws
programme.desc: The Pugs make a hospitalized child's wish come true; The Pugs search for Bob's Gift.

programme.title: Mira, Royal Detective: The Case of the Dance Off Disaster/ Mystery at the Camel Fair
programme.desc: Mira must figure out who is sabotaging performances at the dance competition. When decorations for Priya and Meena's entry into the camel fair go missing, Mira must investigate.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Bouncy Bouncy Baby/ Like Cats and Dogs
programme.desc: Pip gets locked inside a crate with a baby kangaroo. Pip and Freddy must teach squabbling kitten and puppy siblings to share.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Cheetah Chase / Training Daze
programme.desc: When a cheetah is accidentally set loose, Pip and Freddy must play a game of tag to catch it; Pip and Freddy find themselves leading a group of storks on a class trip.

programme.title: Bluey: Wagon Ride / Taxi / The Beach
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo take a wagon ride with their Dad to the park; Bluey has a taxi service with her Dad as her first passenger; Bluey tries to catch up to her Mum on the beach.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Scuba-Doggies/ Walking the Bob
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on an underwater adventure to retrieve a lost package. After a visit to the eye doctor, it's up to the pups to lead a blurry-eyed Bob home.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Windy City/ Sham-pooch
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to the Windy City for Bob's kite! Keia is nervous about going to the groomer, so the pugs make it their mission to help her.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Keia's Birthday Balloon Bash / Hide-and-Go-Sleep
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to find a special balloon for Keia's birthday party. When the pugs' cousin, Cody, goes missing during a game of hide-and-seek, Bingo and Rolly must find him before his family comes to pick him up.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob's Blue Belt/ The Playcare Heist
programme.desc: Bob's blue belt doesn't arrive in time for his martial arts class photo, so Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to get him a belt. When Keia realizes she accidentally left her favorite stuffed animal at Playcare, she and the pugs set off to rescue it.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Bringing This Family Home/ Flight of the Penguin
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy help fly KC's family home to meet their new baby cousin! The Junior Fliers try to deliver two babies at once.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Night Flight/ Slippery When Wet
programme.desc: Freddy must face his fear of the dark when he and Pip are assigned a nighttime delivery. Pip hopes to speed through the next delivery, but they are tasked to deliver a baby sloth.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Engine Nine, Feelin' Fine/ The Right Stuff
programme.desc: Doc and her toys learn a lesson about dehydration after discovering that Donny's toy fire engine has run out of water. Stuffy rips his tail and tries to hide it from Doc and the toys learn that anyone can get hurt - even brave dragons.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bye Bye, Butterfly/ A Seat at the Theatre
programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Bark Bowl / When Hedgie Met Sallie
programme.desc: The pups get trained by a puppyball expert for the puppyball championship. Hedgie helps the pups catch the veggie bandit in Bob's vegetable patch.

programme.title: Bluey: The Doctor / The Claw / Markets
programme.desc: Honey has to wait for Dr. Bingo's appointment; Bluey and Bingo fail to get candy from a claw machine; Bluey wants to buy something from the market.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Kermit's Big Show / The Card Shark
programme.desc: The Muppets put on a show for Miss Nanny but Kermit's directing style is too strict. After Piggy keeps cheating at a board game, Rizzo gives her a run for her money.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: The Big Fairy Share Scare
programme.desc: Timmy finds out that he has to share his fairies with the new girl in school, Chloe Carmichael. But when Chloe realizes she can use her magic for good, she wishes everyone in Dimmsdale would share everything, and chaos ensues.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: A Boy and His Dog-Boy/ Crock Blocked
programme.desc: Timmy wishes Sparky was a human. Timmy becomes a dog and has to convince Sparky to change back to canine form. Timmy wishes Mr. Crocker would disappear. Mr. Crocker becomes invisible. Dad thinks the house is haunted.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: iHear/ Switch Witch

programme.desc: Molly trains to participate in a cross-country ski race where Sharon Firth will be speaking, but it's harder than it look. Then, while Molly and her family are fly-fishing, a hungry seal sneaks into their boat and eats their lunch.

programme.title: Xavier Riddle and the Secret Museum: I Am Mary Leaky/ I Am Alexander Hamilton
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of Xavier, Yadina, & Brad as they travel back to meet famous heroes.

programme.title: Let's Go Luna!: Totally Totem/ Glacier or Bust
programme.desc: Andy and Luna want to tell their story and enlist the help of a totem pole artist. Andy wants to experience the beautiful blue light of the Mendenhall.

programme.title: This Old House: Westerly/ Chimney Down and Walls Up
programme.desc: Mark and Jeff take down the chimney. Scott and Shayla window shop. Jeff and Richard visit a convention to discover new plumbing products, while back at the ranch the exterior walls come down. Jeff will reuse the original rafters for new wall framing.

programme.title: Ask This Old House: Nursery Paint, Record Stand
programme.desc: Mauro paints a baby’s nursery using zero VOC paint; Richard tests out a new dryer that uses a heat pump to dry the clothes; Tom and Kevin build a record player stand out of oak plywood.

programme.title: Woodsmith Shop: Combination Router Table & Custom Molding
programme.desc: The Woodsmith editors begin a combination router table that adds more capability to any shop.

programme.title: Motorweek
programme.desc: The 2020 Volkswagen Atlas Cross Sport and the 2020 Nissan Versa are driven.

programme.title: Ciao Italia: White Apron/ Grembule Bianco
programme.desc: Mary Ann helps chef owner Jay Cruzio of White Apron prepare Ossu Buco with Polenta. Mary Ann also makes parmesan cheesecake.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen: A Stovetop Dinner
programme.desc: Ziti with Kale and Crispy Bacon and Monkfish Meatballs are made.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen From Cook's Illustrated: Mexican Comfort Food
programme.desc: This series invites viewers into the world of product, food and recipe testing.

programme.title: Food Over 50: Quality Calories
programme.desc: Inform, instruct and entertain with artistic and appetizing preparations of recipes.

programme.title: Christina Cooks: Back to the Cutting Board: Your Real Happy Meal
programme.desc: Recipes include: black bean burgers, cracked potatoes, and almond joyfuls.

programme.title: Best of the Joy of Painting
programme.desc: The late Bob Ross instructs the painting hobbyist while offering words of encouragement.

programme.title: Painting With Paulson: Full Force
programme.desc: Join Buck Paulson to learn tips and techniques to help you paint like a pro.

programme.title: Best of Sewing With Nancy: Change Up Patchwork
programme.desc: Nancy Zieman shows you the basics of stitching the versatile 9-patch quilt block, and then she details how to take a fresh approach toward assembling the block to change it up!

programme.title: Fons & Porter's Love of Quilting: Pickled Pink
programme.desc: Tackle a traditional Pickle Dish quilt-this one sewn in a delicious palette of solids-with the help of Sara Gallegos.

programme.title: Garden Smart
programme.desc: Horticultural experts from across the United States share their knowledge and gardening experience.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Song of Gregory William Yates
programme.desc: Gregory Yates escapes from prison and the team learns he intends to flee to New York. The SVU team informs Intelligence that he has been gathering information on Lindsay.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Kasual With a K

programme.title: Movie: Boo! A Madea Halloween
programme.desc: Madea and her friends are asked to watch her great-niece on Halloween. As the night goes on they are plagued by supernatural events. Madea has to keep the teens out of trouble while fending off a number of paranormal threats like ghosts and zombies.

programme.title: 30 Rock: A One-Time Special
programme.desc: Liz Lemon, and Jack Donaghy reunite the TGS team to help Kenneth Parcell with an advertiser presentation.

programme.title: Movie: Boo 2! A Madea Halloween
programme.desc: When the kids go to a Halloween party at a haunted campground were a number of murders were once committed, Madea, Bam and Hattie set out to bring them home before anything bad can happen to them, but a chainsaw-wielding killer gets there before they do.

programme.title: Modern Family: Do You Believe in Magic?
programme.desc: Fearful that the romance between him and Claire is fizzling, Phil calls upon his alter ego, Clive Bixby, to get Valentine’s Day back on track. Jay and Gloria must deal with Joe's inappropriate Valentine gift-giving and Manny's dating indecisiveness.

programme.title: Modern Family: Heavy Is the Head
programme.desc: Despite their hopes, Phil and Jay's property investment might turn out to be a bust, forcing Phil to rethink his original dream. Meanwhile, Cam lands in the hospital due to a head injury and refuses to have an MRI thanks to a traumatic childhood incident.

programme.title: Modern Family: Finding Fizbo
programme.desc: Cam is enraged when he receives an online video showing someone has been desecrating his beloved Fizbo costume, which sets him on a quest to restore Fizbo's good name.

programme.title: Modern Family: Basketball
programme.desc: After choking at last year's charity basketball game, Phil has been training all year to redeem himself. However, when NBA stars Charles Barkley and DeAndre Jordan attend the game and start making bets, Phil tries to not buckle under the pressure.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Badminton to the Bone

programme.title: Dateline: The Summer of Manson

programme.title: Bones: The Money Maker on the Merry-Go-Round

programme.title: Bones: The Puzzler in the Pit
programme.desc: After a famous crossword puzzle master is found in an urban fracking site, the Jeffersonian team investigates the puzzle champ's fellow players in order to track down the killer.

programme.title: Movie: Rampage
programme.desc: A primatologist has a closer bond with George, a friendly gorilla that he's raised since infanthood, than he does with any humans, but when the animal is exposed to a genetic experiment it grows to a massive size and goes on a destructive rampage.

programme.title: Movie: Kill Bill: Vol. 1
programme.desc: A retired assassin with a new identity is attacked and left for dead by her former associates. She awakens from her coma bent on individual revenge.

programme.title: Movie: Kill Bill: Vol. 2
programme.desc: An expert assassin called The Bride continues her quest for vengeance against her former boss and his two remaining associates.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: End of the Line
programme.desc: A gruesome copycat murder on a street car reopens a former case for Wade, evoking painful memories from her past.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The Last Stand
programme.desc: Pride's long-time friend, state and military attorney asks NCIS to investigate the disappearance of a JAG lawyer who specializes in classified cases and volunteers at a private military academy.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Swift, Silent, Deadly
programme.desc: A highly credentialed and skilled Special Ops Marine sends Pride and the team on a city-wide manhunt after he assaults six men in a bar.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Touched by the Sun
programme.desc: When a female combat pilot and navy hero dies in an air-show plane crash, the team must investigate if it's the fault of the pilot or the new jet that was just approved to deploy to bases globally.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: I Do
programme.desc: The team must determine why a murdered navy drone pilot was using a black market drone to obtain military surveillance and whether the drone's footage is linked to his death.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Foreign Affairs
programme.desc: Special Agent Pride is sent a partner from the Australian Defence Force Investigation Service, Special Agent Naomi Parsons, after an Australian Royal Navy lieutenant, who was key to international negotiations on nuclear weapons, is murdered.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Insane in the Membrane
programme.desc: The team's participation in the annual Red Dress Run is cut short when a Petty Officer is found dead in the French Quarter from a drug overdose.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Broken Hearted
programme.desc: The life of a genius navy coder employed by Brody's mother, Olivia, hangs in the balance after the heart intended for his transplant is stolen. Olivia joins the team as they race to locate the missing organ.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Confluence
programme.desc: Special Agent Pride and Sonja are ambushed and on the run after traveling to Texas to escort a key witness for the trial of an infamous arms dealer that Pride apprehended.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Darkest Hour
programme.desc: During a city-wide blackout that impedes law enforcement and emergency response teams, Pride vows to solve the murder of a family friend's fiancé.

programme.title: Movie: Kill Bill: Vol. 1
programme.desc: A retired assassin with a new identity is attacked and left for dead by her former associates. She awakens from her coma bent on individual revenge.
