programme.desc: Two Los Angeles detectives wage war against a merciless Chinese slave-smuggling ring.

programme.title: Movie: Grown Ups
programme.desc: Five good friends and former teammates reunite after their high school basketball coach passes away.

programme.title: Movie: Ferris Bueller's Day Off
programme.desc: A high school student decides to take the day off school and enjoy it with his friends.

programme.title: Friday Night In with The Morgans: Friday Night In with The Morgans: Episode 12
programme.desc: The Morgans check in with their friends Lennie James, Bethany Joy Lenz, and Dr. Sharagim Kemp via video chat.

programme.title: Movie: Summer Rental
programme.desc: An air-traffic controller takes a vacation where everything is out of control.

programme.title: Movie: Road House
programme.desc: A professional bouncer from New York moves to Missouri to ensure that a rowdy bar is safer for the patrons and musicians. When trouble is started by a local businessman, an old friend comes to town to help protect the bar's liquor shipments from thugs.

programme.title: NOS4A2: The Lake House
programme.desc: With Charlie Manx on the hunt, Vic and her family go into hiding with Maggie. Wayne suffers mysterious nightmares while Tabitha chases a lead on Bing.

programme.title: Friday Night In with The Morgans: Friday Night In with The Morgans: Episode 12
programme.desc: The Morgans check in with their friends Lennie James, Bethany Joy Lenz, and Dr. Sharagim Kemp via video chat.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Worth

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Wrath
programme.desc: In the season finale, the communities join forces in the last stand against the Saviors. The season's storylines culminate in all out war.

programme.title: Movie: Fool's Gold
programme.desc: A married couple rekindle their marriage and romance on an adventure to find a treasure.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Carpet Burns and a Bite Mark
programme.desc: Charlie organizes an intervention in order to keep Alan from reuniting with his ex-wife, Judith.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Your Dismissive Attitude Toward Boobs
programme.desc: Charlie and Alan get into a power struggle when Alan allows Berta to stay at Charlie's house for a few days while her brother tries to wean himself off drugs at her place. Berta, who has an ulterior motive, plays one brother against the other.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: We Called It Mr. Pinky
programme.desc: A bout of impotence causes Charlie to re-examine his feelings toward women.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Hi, Mr. Horned One
programme.desc: Charlie thinks he's in heaven when he starts dating Isabella, a wild, sexually uninhibited woman, until Alan points out that she's bringing him much closer to hell. He's unfazed by Alan's warning until Isabella threatens to put a curse on his manhood.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Sleep Tight, Puddin' Pop
programme.desc: Charlie puts himself in a compromising position when he spends a drunken evening with his stalker, Rose. Later, he comes face-to-face with her father, who demands to know what Charlie's intentions are with his daughter.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: That Voodoo That I Do Do
programme.desc: After his overtures toward a ballet teacher are rejected, Charlie will stop at nothing to prove that he can persuade her to go out with him. When he talks Jake into taking her dance class to help his cause, his plan is derailed when Jake falls for her.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Madame and Her Special Friend
programme.desc: Alan strikes up a friendship with Charlie's elderly neighbour, Norma, only to find himself on the defensive as she tries to win his affections. Meanwhile, Charlie tries to dissuade Jake from donating money to a televangelist.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Something Salted and Twisted
programme.desc: Alan has a family dinner to celebrate the publication of a newspaper article that calls him a 'good doctor, neighbour and guy,' but he's crushed when his mother is not impressed. After drowning his sorrow in many drinks, he has a life-changing epiphany.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Santa's Village of the Damned
programme.desc: Alan falls for his cooking class teacher, who quickly moves into the house, fattens the guys up with gourmet meals, drives Berta crazy with housekeeping tips and generally turns all of their lives upside down.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: That Special Tug
programme.desc: Charlie and Alan drop Jake off at a friend's house and head out for some sibling bonding at the movies, but their night is ruined when Alan freaks out after convincing himself that Jake was too eager to spend the weekend away from him.

programme.title: Movie: White Men Can't Jump
programme.desc: A white con artist teams up with a black basketball hustler and con their way across the country.

programme.title: Movie: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Two hip Miami undercover detectives have 72 hours to nab the crooks who stole millions in recovered heroin from the police station.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Town
programme.desc: A woman leaves behind a life in Boston to embark on a new adventure. Unbeknownst to her, she ends up on an unexpected detour that changes both her life, and her romantic future.

programme.title: Movie: The Mistletoe Secret
programme.desc: A woman has big hopes for her town's big holiday adventure, until she meets the man behind the plan.

programme.title: Movie: Mingle All the Way
programme.desc: A young entrepreneur invents a new dating app designed to help singles find dates to events. She personally tests it out in the weeks before Christmas and is connected with a like-minded individual whom she's already dated, several times.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Next Door
programme.desc: The author of bachelor lifestyle books, is left in charge of his young niece and nephew for the holidays.

programme.title: Movie: Hallmark Hall of Fame: A Christmas Love Story
programme.desc: A youth-choir director is tasked with writing the title song for her Christmas Eve show but becomes distracted when a gifted boy joins the choir. Unbeknownst to her, this boy does not tell his widowed father of his plans to sing in the service.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Under the Stars
programme.desc: A man loses his job right before Christmas, so he takes a temporary job selling trees. While at work, he meets a woman and her son, who are dealing with the sudden loss of her father. The two get to talking, and out of their loss, love grows.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas at Cartwright's
programme.desc: A single mom is unemployed and broke at Christmas. She is desperate to find a job in order to make her daughter's holiday a happy one.

programme.title: Movie: Let It Snow
programme.desc: When a resort executive is sent to a newly purchased lodge in Maine with instructions to turn it into an ultra-modern resort, she finds a charming, successful lodge loaded with holiday spirit and makes a connection with the owner's handsome son.

programme.title: Movie: Reunited at Christmas
programme.desc: A novelist and her boyfriend head to her late grandmother's house for Christmas.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Connection
programme.desc: A flight attendant is asked to stay for Christmas by a family after she returns a package left on a plane by a passenger and misses her connection back home.

programme.title: Movie: Switched for Christmas
programme.desc: Identical twin sisters decide to swap lives for the holidays, learning valuable lessons along the way.

programme.title: Movie: With Love, Christmas
programme.desc: An ad executive and her uptight co-worker must create the ultimate Christmas commercial. To complicate things, they are also each-others Secret Santa.

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Duet
programme.desc: Famous for their beloved Christmas duet, fate brings ex-music duo together over the holidays, just in time for the annual Yuletide Festival.

programme.title: South Park: The New Terrance and Phillip Movie Trailer
programme.desc: All the kids in South Park are glued to the TV, wild with anticipation to see the first trailer for the latest Terrance and Phillip movie.

programme.title: South Park: Grey Dawn
programme.desc: With South Park's senior citizens behind the wheel, more than a few farmer's markets have been mowed down. Unwilling to surrender their driver's licenses, the elderly fight back.

programme.title: South Park: The Wacky Molestation Adventure
programme.desc: To get back at his parents for not letting him go to a concert, Kyle tells the police that his parents molested him. Soon, the whole town is free of adults and divided into two rival factions.

programme.title: South Park: Something You Can Do With Your Finger
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Kenny and Cartman form their own boy band, 'Fingerbang,' and search for a fifth member. It is also Carman's latest scheme to make a million dollars.

programme.title: South Park: Terrance and Phillip: Behind the Blow
programme.desc: When the boys discover Terrance and Philip have called it quits, they'll go to any lengths to reunite the duo and recruit them for South Park's Earth Day festivities.

programme.title: South Park: Trapper Keeper
programme.desc: Cartman is elated to have a new, multi-functional Trapper Keeper, the Ultra Keeper Futura S2000. A mysterious stranger warns Cartman that, unless they destroy it, his Trapper Keeper will eventually take over the world and destroy humankind.

programme.title: South Park: Free Hat
programme.desc: When the boys find out that their favourite movies are being enhanced, re-released and ruined in the process, they form a club to 'Save Films from their Directors.'

programme.title: South Park: Terrance and Phillip in 'Not Without My Anus'
programme.desc: Terrance and Phillip must travel to Iran to save Terrance's little daughter, Sally. While they are gone Saddam Hussein takes over Canada, leaving Terrance and Phillip to save the entire country.

programme.title: South Park: Do the Handicapped Go to Hell?
programme.desc: The boys become obsessed with religion and redemption after they're scared by a sermon about Hell. Meanwhile, Saddam returns to Hell and tries to have Satan's new boyfriend 'taken care of.'

programme.title: South Park: Probably
programme.desc: When their church's answers aren't sufficient to sate the boys' fear, they break off from their church and Cartman takes on the role of evangelical preacher. Meanwhile in Hell, the feud between Chris and Saddam continues.

programme.title: South Park: Clubhouses
programme.desc: Stan and Kyle are psyched to have Wendy and Bebe visit their clubhouse for a game of 'Truth or Dare,' but first they have to build one. When they won't let Carman join, he and Kenny build their own clubhouse and invite teenage girls to play with them.

programme.title: South Park: Raisins
programme.desc: After Wendy breaks up with Stan the boys take him to 'Raisins,' a local restaurant known for its great chicken wings and hot girls.

programme.title: Esther Povitsky: Hot for My Name
programme.desc: In between time spent with her parents, Esther Povitsky addresses her mature name, shares her Instagram snooping habits and rifles through fans' bags at her stand-up shows.

programme.title: South Park: It's a Jersey Thing
programme.desc: Randy spearheads the town's defence when 'Jersey Shore'-inspired Garden State residents are threatening to take over the entire country.

programme.title: South Park: City Sushi
programme.desc: Butters is diagnosed with multiple personality disorder. Meanwhile, the owner of City Wok is outraged when the town's newest business opens up next door.

programme.title: South Park: Professor Chaos
programme.desc: When the boys fire Butters as their new friend, devastation over his rejection unleashes his dark side and the super villain Professor Chaos is born.

programme.title: South Park: Simpsons Already Did It
programme.desc: Professor Chaos is frustrated when he realizes all of his diabolical plans to wreak havoc on South Park have already been done by 'The Simpsons.' Meanwhile, Cartman and the boys try to retrieve their sea-men from Ms. Choksondik's stomach.

programme.title: South Park: Mecha-Streisand
programme.desc: The boys' discovery of a prehistoric relic draws the attention of the power hungry Barbara Streisand. With the help of some powerful friends, the boys try to stop Mecha-Streisand from destroying South Park and the world.

programme.title: South Park: Spooky Fish
programme.desc: When Sharon Marsh's Aunt Flo makes a monthly visit, she brings a mysterious pet fish for Stan. He soon begins to believe that his fish, and other 'evil' pets are linked to a series of murders in the town.

programme.title: South Park: Breast Cancer Show Ever
programme.desc: Wendy gets into trouble when she threatens to beat up Cartman after school is out.

programme.title: South Park: Major Boobage
programme.desc: In a South Park homage to the 1981 film, 'Heavy Metal,' the boys are trying to get Kenny off the latest drug craze that's captured the junior high and under set.

programme.title: South Park: Whale Whores
programme.desc: Stan takes action to stop the Japanese from killing the world's whales and dolphins.

programme.title: South Park: Handicar
programme.desc: Timmy's successful new car service makes him a lot of enemies.

programme.title: The Office: Andy's Ancestry
programme.desc: Andy learns he is related to Michelle Obama and flaunts his bloodlines.

programme.title: The Office: Work Bus
programme.desc: When Jim convinces Dwight that the building is unsafe, Dwight rents a bus and sets up the office inside. Nellie asks for Andy's help in adopting a baby and Jim tries to make Pam happy with some pie.

programme.title: The Office: Here Comes Treble
programme.desc: It's Halloween at the office and Andy invites his college a capella group to perform. Dwight searches for evidence of a madman loose in the office.

programme.title: The Office: The Boat
programme.desc: Andy must man up when his Dad blows all the family money. When Dwight is interviewed on local radio, Jim and the office torture him with bizarre call ins.

programme.title: The Office: The Whale

programme.title: The Office: The Target
programme.desc: Angela discovers her husband's affair with Oscar and goes to Dwight for help. Jim needs a favour from Stanley and Phyllis who milk it for all it's worth.

programme.title: The Office: Lice
programme.desc: Pam accidentally brings lice into the office and lets Meredith take the fall. Meanwhile, Jim has a fantastic day in Philly wooing a potential business associate.

programme.title: The Office: Suit Warehouse
programme.desc: Dwight and Clark pose as a father and son in order to sell a suit warehouse.

programme.title: The Office: Customer Loyalty
programme.desc: Dwight tries to prevent Darryl from moving to Athlead; Jim misses Cece's recital when a big investor visits his new company.

programme.title: The Office: Junior Salesman
programme.desc: David tasks Dwight with finding a new part time salesman to fill in for Jim. Meanwhile, Pam tries to figure out who will be her new desk mate and Erin tries to find her birth parents with Pete's help.

programme.title: The Office: Vandalism
programme.desc: When Pam asks the office to help her track down the vandal who defaced her mural, Dwight and Nellie spring to action. Darryl has difficulty dealing with the cleanliness habits of Jim in their shared Philly apartment.

programme.title: Movie: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa
programme.desc: Alex, Marty, Melman and Gloria attempt to leave Madagascar but wind up landing in Africa. Alex meets his family but struggles to communicate with them due to his easy life in the Central Park Zoo.

programme.title: Movie: Megamind
programme.desc: After killing his good-guy alter ego, a supervillain becomes bored when there is no one else to fight. He creates a new foe, and then sets out to destroy the world.

programme.title: Movie: The Other Mother
programme.desc: Jackie tries not to let it bother her when her ex-husband's new wife bonds with her teenage daughter. But the stepmother turns the teen against Jackie and begins to lead her down a dark path.

programme.title: Movie: Stolen By My Mother: The Kamiyah Mobley Story
programme.desc: After a miscarriage, a young woman poses as a nurse and steals a mother's baby leading to a lifetime of uncertainty.

programme.title: Movie: Maternal Secrets
programme.desc: For Aubrey, it was supposed to be the trip of a lifetime, a week in Bermuda to celebrate her pregnancy. But when her boyfriend Jackson disappears without a trace, Aubrey's dream vacation becomes an island nightmare.

programme.title: Movie: Expectant
programme.desc: A woman finds herself unexpectedly pregnant and broke. Convinced that she's unable to raise a child and eager to escape an unstable boyfriend, she puts her baby up for adoption.

programme.title: Married at First Sight: The Story Begins
programme.desc: One groom's motives are put to the test when the bachelor party takes a wild turn; and cold feet turn to ice when one bride discovers her husband's identity the night before the wedding day.

programme.title: Movie: Psycho Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: A psycho ex-girlfriend comes back to haunt her ex-boyfriend and his new girlfriend with violent threats.

programme.title: Movie: Anniversary Nightmare
programme.desc: On a trip to Hawaii, a woman wakes up to find her husband missing, and as the only person in the room she becomes the prime suspect. The system fails her, so she must solve the mystery on her own.

programme.title: Movie: The Perfect Mother
programme.desc: Stella Marshall finds herself on the outs with her own rebellious daughter Shay, she soon attracts the attention of a dangerous teen fan girl named Peyton who will stop at nothing to make Stella the perfect mother of her own.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pure Evil
programme.desc: In 1993, two Texas teenagers, a 14-year-old boy and his 13-year-old stepsister, were brutally murdered. It took forensic evidence and a behavioral profile to identify their killer as Jason Massey, who had a history of torturing animals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Prosecutors turned to a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist to solve a missing person's case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Disappearance of Helle Crafts
programme.desc: A flight attendant was reported missing from her home after hiring an investigator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Footpath Murders
programme.desc: British detectives teamed up with a pioneering scientist to crack a case of sexual assault and serial murder. This 1986 case marked the first time DNA was used as evidence in a court of law.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Fog
programme.desc: Investigators set out to determine if the dense, thick fog that caused the deadliest automobile accident on American history was a natural phenomenon, or the result of something else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sex, Lies and DNA
programme.desc: While Earl Morris was vacationing in California, he learned his wife had gone missing from their home in Arizona. The search for Ruby Morris involved dozens of investigators and scientists, even the coast guard.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Voice From Beyond
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Ambition
programme.desc: A Seattle policeman’s home is destroyed by an arsonist. One month later, the officer arrests a low-level drug dealer, who confesses to the arson. But when the suspect vanishes, investigators begin to question the authenticity of his confession.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lasting Impressions
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Foundation of Lies
programme.desc: The wife of a noted doctor goes missing and authorities believe it may have to do with an allegedly shady adoption ring until her husband goes house-shopping with another woman claiming to be his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bio-Attack
programme.desc: A religious cult's bizarre plot to overthrow the government using germ warfare.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: A woman is found dead of a gunshot wound and police conclude that she was murdered by her husband. Forensic scientists were able to piece together the clues and determine what really happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bitter Pill to Swallow
programme.desc: A pregnant woman experiences severe morning sickness and suspects something is amiss.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sip of Sins
programme.desc: Faryion Wardrip seemed like the model citizen to most, but he was also a brutal serial killer who, for years, eluded police without suspicion. But smart police work and DNA from a discarded paper cup proved to be Wardrip's undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sealed With a Kiss
programme.desc: For more than a year, angry, hateful letters were sent to a first grade school teacher in a small town in Pennsylvania. When scientists analyzed the letters, they found evidence that the sender knew a lot about the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Postal Mortem
programme.desc: On October 15, 1985, two bombs rocked Salt Lake City and resulted in two deaths. A third explosion occurred the next day, but this time the victim survived. Police believed that the survivor is more than an innocent by-stander.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Beaten by a Hair
programme.desc: Laura Houghteling left her Bethesda home and walked to the station to take a train to work. A peculiar strand of hair found in Laura's hairbrush enabled investigators to unravel the mystery of her disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crime Seen
programme.desc: After years in prison, Edward Honaker finally found someone who believed him, and was willing to pay for DNA testing which could prove he was innocent.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Treading Not So Lightly
programme.desc: When a four-year-old girl is found unconscious in a parking lot, police concluded it was a hit and run vehicle accident, and left it at that. But the girl's mother was determined to find out exactly what had happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shopping Spree
programme.desc: A mother and her daughter leave home for a day of shopping, but never return. The little girl's body was found dumped off of a roadside, but there was no sign of her mother. Forensic science determined if the baby's mother was a suspect or a victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Prayer
programme.desc: Madalyn Murray O'Hair and her two top lieutenants disappeared with no shortage of suspects. Her abduction may never have been solved if it weren't for the discovery of a headless, handless body, and the serial number on an artificial hip.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clutch of Witnesses
programme.desc: Two eyewitnesses see a truck intentionally drive over a sleeping man outside a motorcycle gang's clubhouse. During the investigation the witnesses, the truck, and the body disappear, leaving police just one clue: a bloodstain in the snow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Cheater
programme.desc: Little did Walter Scott of the band 'Bob Kuban and the In-Men' know that their 1966 hit-single 'The Cheater' would foreshadow the events that would lead to his demise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Forever Hold Your Peace
programme.desc: When a young man confessed to the rape and murder of a woman in a restaurant, police were convinced the case was solved. Eight years later, another man imprisoned for an unrelated crime, admitted he committed the murder.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Son of Sam: The Duke of Death
programme.desc: He is among the most infamous serial killers in American history. From 1976 to 1977, David Berkowitz terrorized New York City under his creepy self-given moniker: the Son of Sam.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Son of Sam: I Am A Monster
programme.desc: In 1977, the city of New York was being stalked by a seemingly faceless serial killer known as, 'Son of Sam.' But after his final shooting took him to Brooklyn, a twist of fate and a little luck led to his capture.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Blood and Water
programme.desc: Army vet Joe D'Ambrosio is sentenced to death for a 1988 murder. No one listened to his pleas of innocence until Father Neil Kookoothe began investigating the case and discovered a shocking coverup.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Death, Lies and Videotape
programme.desc: The execution-style killings of a Florida nightclub owner and two aspiring models are caught on camera.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Family Lies
programme.desc: After a family of six is found brutally murdered in a rural Texas town, a perpetrator confesses to the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Slippery Motives
programme.desc: While staying at a hotel in St. Louis, Missouri, a Louisiana woman drowns in a bathtub. Her husband claims it was an accident, but detectives are skeptical as they discover evidence of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Deceit
programme.desc: Women in a small Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who becomes so experienced he leaves no clues to his identity. But computer technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool: geographical profiling.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scout's Honor
programme.desc: Police determine that the human remains found in a discarded box belong to one Edna Posey. But to find out whether the man accused of the crime is guilty, investigators turn to insects and the forensic entomologist who can interpret their behavior.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Touching Recollection
programme.desc: An eighteen-year-old girl is abducted at gunpoint from her home in Jackson, Ohio. Fortunately the victim returns hours later, and police hope the tire impressions and shoe prints at the crime scene will enable them to find the perpetrator.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Ken Gets Played
programme.desc: A debtor suddenly swipes the helicopter that Ken and Danny were only seconds away from repossessing. Mike Kennedy enlists the help of his wife, Valerie, in a daring plot to seize a charter jet. Kevin is swarmed by FBI agents after an exhausting repo.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: No Safe Harbor
programme.desc: Mike and his wife go undercover to repo a go-fast boat. Ken and Danny bring in some talented friends to pull off a rare simultaneous triple repo, and Kevin attempts to swipe a deadbeat flight school's entire fleet of Cessnas.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Dredged Up: The Heat is Off
programme.desc: With added scenes and facts: Shawn claws his way to the top and Emily leaves her father to tend the Eroica. Meanwhile, Kris pursues a brighter future and Ken pushes the Myrtle Irene.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Claim of Thrones
programme.desc: Kris mines an undersea trench, but a cave-in of rocks threatens his life, pinning him to the seafloor. Desperate to find a patch of career-saving gold, Shawn follows a hunch to deeper ground.

programme.title: Dino Hunters: We Got Skull
programme.desc: With their prized carnivore fossil finally at the lab, Clayton returns to his ranch in Montana to hunt for quick finds at Old Faithful. In Wyoming, Mike Harris and his team continue excavating their triceratops site hoping to uncover the valuable horns.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Bermuda Triangle Doomsday
programme.desc: Mysterious reports of boiling seas in the Bermuda Triangle might be evidence of a deadly undersea volcano with a long list of victims. Jeremy Wade investigates the newest discoveries from this strange stretch of water in search of proof.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: The Bermuda Triangle Conspiracy
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates if one of the Bermuda Triangle's most infamous disappearances was part of a conspiracy by a secret agent at war with the United States, and using technology, experts reveal if it vanished for far stranger reasons.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Claim of Thrones
programme.desc: Kris mines an undersea trench, but a cave-in of rocks threatens his life, pinning him to the seafloor. Desperate to find a patch of career-saving gold, Shawn follows a hunch to deeper ground.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: The Kellys' Fireworks Extravaganza
programme.desc: For Independence Day, the Kellys travel back to Northern California for an explosive adventure.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: The Heat is Off
programme.desc: As summer's end approaches, Shawn claws his way closer to the top of the gold count. Emily leaves her unpredictable father to tend on the Eroica. Kris works his new partnership in pursuit of a brighter future. Ken pushes the repaired Myrtle Irene.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds
programme.desc: A racetrack collision ends with a multi-car pileup; a factory is destroyed in an explosion.

programme.title: Sport Fishing Television: Trackers
programme.desc: The Tropic Star Lodge in Panama and the Guy Harvey Research Foundation join forces to understand the billfish.

programme.title: Major League Fishing: Bass Pro Tour: 2020 Stage Two Knockout Round - Okeechobee
programme.desc: The Stage 2 Knockout Round of Bass Pro Tour, from Okeechobee, Florida.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Rowe'd Trip: Dirty Infrastructure
programme.desc: Mike Rowe and his dirty crew hit the highway to see the sights and reminisce about classic American infrastructure jobs from the show's history. Along the way they check in with some of the hard-working men and women that keep the country moving.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Rowe'd Trip: Tight Spaces
programme.desc: En route to explore a cave, Mike Rowe and his dirty crew reminisce about classic jobs from the show's history that had them squirming into tight spaces. They also check in with some of the hard-working people that have been featured on the program.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Kingdom of the Vanished
programme.desc: A mysterious town in the hills of South Africa was once a booming community, but today, the eerie place is deserted. Experts reveal the cataclysm that caused the people of this once-prosperous town to suddenly leave and never come back.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting of Heartbreak Castle
programme.desc: Experts investigate what was once a fairy-tale castle, but now is abandoned, and rumored to be haunted. They uncover secrets of the ancient fortress, and its ghostly stories.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Conspiracy on Devil's Mountain
programme.desc: A secret structure on a sinister mountain, an industrial compound swallowed by a forest, and a mysterious run in a sand dune are strange deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Labyrinth of the Dead
programme.desc: Tunnels filled with human bones lie beneath the streets of Paris, and this horrifying engineering marvel points to a dark secret. New discoveries reveal why this grisly underground death maze was built, and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Cliff City
programme.desc: A city in the cliffs of the American Southwest was once home to tens of thousands of people, but today, the city stands deserted, and new evidence of human remains reveals the real reason why these people met a violent end.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: Some of the world's most incredible engineering projects are now deserted.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: An American Gypsy in Romania
programme.desc: Adopted bride Andrada can't wait to meet her Romanian birth family at her huge Gypsy wedding. But when trouble arises, she travels across the world to keep the dream alive. Inari defies her strict family and reveals a shocking secret plan at her Sweet 16.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Mama Said Knock You Out
programme.desc: Gypsy Trouble and her gorger fiancé may not have their dream biker-themed wedding because of their fierce, feuding mothers. Alanna's traditional eighth birthday party spirals into an epic battle between her American and Russian gypsy family members.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Other Way: I'm Not Your Baby
programme.desc: Bini's apartment options shock Ari and her mom. Armando prepares for Kenny's arrival. Jenny is out of patience with Sumit's excuses on his divorce papers. Deavan is done with Jihoon's lies. Brittany's visit with Yazan's parents doesn't go as planned.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Happily Ever After?: More to Love: Drive Me Crazy Like a Roulette Wheel
programme.desc: Larissa has a date with a mystery man. In Nigeria, Angela receives a horrific first-day surprise. Colt's mother meets his girlfriend in Brazil. Kalani's father finds out about Asuelu's misdeeds. Elizabeth and Andrei have a rocky first morning in Moldova.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Happily Ever After?: First Look: Ultimatums and Ugly Truths
programme.desc: A first look at the next episode includes Angela meeting Michael's friends, Colt being torn between his mom and his girlfriend and cultures clashing when Andrei's family challenges Elizabeth's role as head of household.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Jeff
programme.desc: Jeff travels by bike to save on gas, crashes on his friends' couch, and repays their kindness by serving a cringe-worthy meal.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: All Wrapped Up
programme.desc: Todd Moriarty is obsessed with preserving the value of his assets. In an effort to keep his home looking like new, he wraps all of his possessions - from his car to his bathroom, in plastic wrap.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Abdul and Vickie
programme.desc: Abdul and Vickie take cheapness to a whole new level, from haggling the price of an anniversary cake to using road kill for gifts.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Jordan/ Michael
programme.desc: Utah housewife Jordan manages to only spend $1400 a month for her family of five by rationing everything and asking her neighbors for their leftovers.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Matt/ Sarah
programme.desc: To afford his dream of becoming a pro-wrestler, Matt has reduced his spending to just $300 a month. Extreme Cheapskate Sarah saves on groceries by never leaving one of her family's catering events without leftovers.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Melody/ Marlin
programme.desc: Melody manages to only spend $1,000 a month for her family of four by sharing her extreme ways. They all sleep in one bed and share bath water. Also, Marlin will face his biggest cost-saving challenge as he organizes his daughter's sweet sixteen.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Roy and Ben
programme.desc: Ben and Roy show off their frugal lifestyles. Ben throws a party on a four dollar budget and Roy shows how he freezes his assets.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Rick and Karissa/ Torski
programme.desc: Karissa and her husband Rick have been competing to be cheaper than the other since their wedding five years ago. By sharing everything from their shower to a single toothbrush, this cheapskate couple has no limit to their cost cutting.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Nobody Pays Retail
programme.desc: Lydia Abate scours the obituaries, then visits surviving family members in hopes of taking the deceased person's clothing off of their hands. Mason Roberts introduces his wife to his entire family of cheapskates.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Father Knows Debt
programme.desc: Patriarch Raul Pinto scours through vacuum canisters at the car wash in hopes of finding spare change. Kia Cambridge limits herself to one piece of gum, every three days.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Guide to Love
programme.desc: Reusing funeral flowers for a date, redoing bedrooms with used hotel sheets, buying thrift store lingerie or planning vow renewals for almost nothing, 'Extreme Cheapskates Guide To Love' shows that love doesn't have to cost a thing.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: The Grass is Always Cheaper

programme.title: Deadline to Disaster: Horror in the Heartland
programme.desc: July 19th, 2018 a tornado outbreak erupts over central Iowa. Twin tornadoes bear down on a small town just northeast of Des Moines. While one tears through open fields destroying small farms, the second damages homes in a local neighborhood.

programme.title: Deadline to Disaster: Capital Catastrophe
programme.desc: Security cameras capture the moment a tornado in Canada's Ottawa National Capital region tears a woman's house to shreds.

programme.title: Deadline to Disaster: Mayhem on Main Street
programme.desc: Memorial Day weekend 2018, almost 10 inches of rain in two hours sends a monster wave of water through downtown Ellicott City, Maryland. It traps tourists and business owners, sweeps vehicles away and collapses buildings.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Avalanches and Volcanoes
programme.desc: Exploding glaciers, venomous snakes and ground crumbling earthquakes. How to survive being buried alive by a massive avalanche and what do when face-to-face with scorching lava erupting from a volcano is also featured.

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Rip Currents and Lightning
programme.desc: What would you do if a volcano erupts in front of you? How would you survive a deadly rip current? Harrowing caught-on-camera video pits you against broken water mains, deadly lightning, dangerous hot air balloon crashes, and giant tsunamis!

programme.title: So You Think You'd Survive?: Surviving the Outdoors
programme.desc: Real-life video from the great outdoors that tests skills against raging rapids, dangerous bears and a bug burrowing in an ear. How to survive a seven-story fall into a glacier and lasting six days in the hot desert with no food or water is featured.

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: Storm Surge
programme.desc: Floods can strike anywhere in the U.S., leaving us cut off and battling for survival. When a record storm surge created a river that surrounded the York's house, the rising water threatened the couple's last refuge.

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: Deadly Cold

programme.desc: The guys pose as employees at a copy centre, conduct bizarre exit interviews for moviegoers and then lead some very peculiar protests. Later, it's unhappy hour for tonight's big loser, as he cuts off paying customers at a party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Toasted
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Sal and Q get in a pickle serving up humiliating tasks as deli waiters, and later, they step behind the counter asking customers to settle a series of silly debates. Plus, tonight's big loser gets burned during an embarrassing toast.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Brownbeaten
programme.desc: The length it took Murr's eyebrows to grow back.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Fe-mail
programme.desc: The Joker that absolutely hates massages; and the length of time it took the make-up team to get Joe all doled up for his debut as a female techie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Water Torture
programme.desc: What impromptu punishment tested the limits of the producers' acting abilities?

programme.title: Movie: Talladega Nights: The Ballad of Ricky Bobby

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Butterfly Crime Scene
programme.desc: Find out what classic phrase was uttered in this early episode that is still said today, and what unaired challenges almost made it to the show. Plus, the real backstory of Butterfly Crime Scene.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joker for a Day
programme.desc: Find out which challenges the crew loves the most and what the original name for the TV show started off as. Also, find out how the Jokers pick their victims.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out questions and trivia like why Q wore a wedding ring during a challenge, which crew member slapped him way too hard, and who has a history with the punishment guest.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hump Day
programme.desc: Learn how the crew attracted more customers to eat at GRK, what piece of iconic 'Jokers' history was made in this same focus group space and who caused several delays in the filming of Q's zoo punishment.

programme.title: Movie: Popstar: Never Stop Never Stopping

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Orlando Leyba Headlines
programme.desc: Orlando Leyba headlines. Plus, Donnell Rawlings tells a story about the time his bike was stolen, and Just Nesh breaks loose in the dressing room.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Plate of Nachos
programme.desc: Adam dishes out the facts on the avocado trade being ruled by drug cartels, and big pork making bacon a pop culture hit while covering up its huge health risks. Plus, America's food problems stem from corn.

programme.desc: Adam tackles classic television stereotypes, from the racism behind public pools, to the 'model minority' myth of Asian Americans, to the on-screen toxic masculinity that's masking the problems young men face today.

programme.desc: Adam hits pause on the myth that connects video games to real-life violence, and reveals that Monopoly was a rip-off of an anti-capitalist teaching game. Plus, Olympic organizers get rich while athletes struggle to get by.

programme.desc: A literature student falls for a wealthy young entrepreneur, who makes clear that any relations between the two of them will be on his own terms. She soon comes to learn of his singular tastes and his need to be completely in control.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades Darker
programme.desc: Christian approaches Ana and asks her to give him a second chance. She agrees with one condition: this time, there isn't going to be any rules or punishments. They start to build trust, but figures from Christian's past threaten to tear them apart.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades Freed
programme.desc: Ana Steel and Christian Grey's fledgling marriage is threatened by jealously when his former lover works her way back into his life, but lurking beyond that is an even greater threat in the form of Ana's disgraced former employer who's out for revenge.

programme.title: Movie: Twilight
programme.desc: A teen yearning for belonging and understanding moves in with her father in Washington State. She soon falls in love with an enigmatic boy at school, who turns out to be a vampire. They find themselves drawn to each other despite their differences.

programme.title: Movie: The Twilight Saga: New Moon
programme.desc: After realizing that Bella would be safer with them out of the picture, the Cullen's leave town. Heartbroken, Bella turns to Jacob for comfort and friendship, but quickly learns that Jacob is keeping a secret of his own.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Flavortown International
programme.desc: Guy goes global with flavours from all over the world. In Warr Acres, Oklahoma, a Middle Eastern smorgasbord serves standout samosas and chicken kebab. A funky spot in Portland, Oregon turns out real-deal Mexican tortas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sammies and Spice
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits Longmont, Colorado to check out what they're doing with cauliflower and pork burgers. In Columbus, Ohio, a Chicago-style restaurant makes Italian beef and gyros. Aarti Sequeira and Jet Tila meet Guy in Los Angeles for fiery Thai.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Racing Through Charlotte
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's checkin' out high octane joints in Charlotte, North Carolina, with NASCAR driver Clint Bowyer. First, the relocated Triple-D alum dishin' out dynamite burgers and a unique spin on shrimp.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fusion of Flavors
programme.desc: In Chicago, a saucy spot mashes up Latin and Asian, putting a unique spin on paella and posole. A comfort food joint in Seattle fires things up with Nashville hot chicken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Island Flavor
programme.desc: Guy's in Hawaii for an authentic taste of Oahu. In Waipahu, a family-run business is serving freshly made favorites right out of mom's cookbook.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Righteous Bites
programme.desc: This trip, Guy is enjoying dishes from both sides of the pacific. In Los Angeles, he's trying a fat Jerry Sammy and a number of fried favorites.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Owned
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits a Mexican restaurant and tortilla factory in San Diego.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Dives Worth a Drive
programme.desc: Guy hunts down killer dives, including a nightclub in Cleveland that serves salmon BLTs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Culinary All-Stars
programme.desc: Guy's family loves cooking at home and great restaurant food, so they're combining the best of both worlds by firing up takeout with a twist. On the menu, there's tandoor chicken poutine and polenta flavour bomb, arancini and empandas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Delicious Discoveries
programme.desc: Guy uncovers surprising culinary discoveries. In Columbus, Ohio, a hidden gem inside a grocery store serves Nepalese-Tibetan specialties. A Mexican spot in Dallas serves seafood tacos and mole fries and another Dallas joint makes dishes from Afghanistan.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Oldies but Goodies
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's hitting up some legit local landmarks. In Des Moines, a historic drive-in is famous for its nearly century-old chili recipe. In Leeds Point, N.J., a scenic seaside joint has served up fresh catch since the '30s.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Favorites
programme.desc: Guy Fieri takes a seat at the family table; In Glendale, Ariz., a German restaurant making sauerbraten from scratch; In Northern California, an old saloon serving lamb shanks; And in Fort Worth, a Texas institution dishing up all the classics.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Chicken Trifecta
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's diggin' into some winner winner chicken dinners! In Maui, Hawaii, it's a star-studded stop at Mick Fleetwood's joint serving the rocker's mom's favourite chicken, plus a dish that musician Sammy Hagar dives right into.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Culinary All-Stars
programme.desc: Guy's family loves cooking at home and great restaurant food, so they're combining the best of both worlds by firing up takeout with a twist. On the menu, there's tandoor chicken poutine and polenta flavour bomb, arancini and empandas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Guy's All-Star Guests
programme.desc: Guy Fieri has a rock-star lineup kickin' it with him in the kitchen. First, in Kansas City, Mo., Chiefs' head coach Andy Reid tackles pigskin at a joint meticulous about their meat.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Full of Surprises
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's digging into some surprising ingredients. In Santa Fe, N.M., a culinary pub serving up lights-out lamb neck and frying up tamales. In Kansas City, Missouri, a funky tapas joint dishin' out duck tongue tacos and braised pork jowl.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Down-Home Flavor
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's hitting the road and digging into some down-home cooking. In Garland, Utah, a century-old staple servin' up savory sandwiches and a legendary sweet treat.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Guy's Going Home
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's hittin' up some of his favourite hometown haunts. First, he pops into a Mexican joint right in his Santa Rosa, Calif., 'hood, where he chows on the pozole every time he's off the road.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: A Little Lighter
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is lightening the load on this trip, starting in Boston, where he pops into Triple D's first diner to check out the egg-white omelets. Then, a Cuban joint in Los Angeles is trading in bread for plantains and stuffing avocado with fresh fish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: A Family Affair
programme.desc: Guy is heading out to check in on family-run favorites. In Honolulu, a set of siblings are ready to roll their mom's Filipino food all around the island. Then, in San Diego, a taquaria has been serving taquitos the same way for three generations.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Beef, Barbecue And Bar Food
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's trip is all about the three B's: beef, barbecue and bar food. First, he stops in Taylor, Texas, at one of the first DDD barbecue joints to pay homage to an old friend whose son is carrying on his legacy.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Steak, Sausage and Salami
programme.desc: It's meat mayhem and Guy Fieri is checking out a joint known for cheesesteaks and meatballs that have taken over Salt Lake City. Then, a father-son team stays true to their Italian roots.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Hooked
programme.desc: Rachael Ray makes a quick and easy fish recipe to fall for hook, line and sinker. Her crispy, golden, battered fishwiches pair perfectly with creamy yogurt tartar sauce, and Rachael adds frozen salt and vinegar fries to round out the meal.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Lights, Camera ... Eat
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli is developing new, foolproof recipes for her website. She makes a batch of savory breakfast muffins and kale caesar salad with crispy garlic and oregano topping along with pork tenderloin steaks with mustard herb sauce.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Poolside Party
programme.desc: The Kitchen throws a pool party with everyone's summer favourites. Katie Lee and Marcela share new ideas for hot dog toppings while Jeff serves up a BBQ chicken slaw. The hosts also share great ways to use watermelon.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Par-T-Que
programme.desc: Trisha whips up some Potato Salad, grill up her cousin Fred's Barbecue Pork Ribs, mix together a Cherry Moscow Mule.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: New Farm Traditions
programme.desc: Molly is putting a fresh spin on the classic farm lunch. There's her easy garlic and onion challah bread, chopped salad with crumbled feta and her all-time favourite creamy homemade hummus.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home 9
programme.desc: Ree shares ideas for four family meals with help from her kid film crew. Ree's husband and his father drop by to share speedy mini sloppy joe sliders. Then Ree makes shortcut Hawaiian chicken bowls, meatless sheet pan gnocchi and lemon shrimp alfredo.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Deli Food Showdown
programme.desc: Ree's testing recipes for her deli and having her friends pick which versions will end up on the menu. First, her basic chicken salad with grapes is up against a delicious curried chicken salad with raisins.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Easy Breezy Summer Meals
programme.desc: The hosts share easy, breezy summer meals. Katie makes baked rigatoni with tomato and eggplant, Jeff makes crispy grilled harissa shrimp Greek salad and Alex prepares summery corn soup, perfect for a hot summer day.

programme.title: Giada at Home: Family Potluck
programme.desc: Giada invites her family to a Sunday potluck via video chat. Everyone makes dinner before dialing in to catch up and eat together. Giada's menu includes kale caesar salad and bacon and mushroom lasagna.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Simply French
programme.desc: Ina is focusing on easy French food that you can make at home, like a classic cheese board and toasted baguette.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Five-Dollar Dishes
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is challenging the chefs to make full-blown meals for four on only $5 a plate. He puts them through their paces as they make breakfast, lunch and dinner.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: All Un-Gredients
programme.desc: Guy challenges four chefs to improvise as they make family favourites without any of the key ingredients. Saucy spaghetti and meatballs, tasty tacos and a comfort food classic are all determined by Guy's wheel.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Single Shop Showdown
programme.desc: Four chefs are given one chance to shop for all three rounds without knowing what they'll be asked to make.

programme.desc: Carrie tries to seductively coax Doug's therapist into targeting his many bad habits.

programme.desc: Doug's so busy planning his Super Bowl party that he forgets about Carrie's work problems.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Prints Charming
programme.desc: After accidentally picking up another couple's photos, Doug and Carrie feel that their lives are boring.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Animal Attraction
programme.desc: Doug has to transport live penguins to the zoo and has to cancel an evening with Carrie.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Golden Moldy
programme.desc: Doug ignores the mould problem in their house and spends the money on a vacation.

programme.desc: Doug is forced to ask his father for money to help fix their expensive mould problem.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Steve Moscow
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie's house is in chaos when their contractor rips apart their walls.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: The Dynamic Duo

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Fonzie Scheme
programme.desc: When Murray is honoured as one of Jenkintown's top businessmen, his plaque is hung on a wall with all of the other honourees. Beverly is soon dismayed to learn he has no discernable hobbies, and her attempts to help him find some backfire.

programme.title: Roseanne: Wait 'Til Your Father Gets Home
programme.desc: After their father dies, Roseanne and Jackie cope with their loss in very different ways.

programme.title: Roseanne: First Cousin, Twice Removed
programme.desc: Roseanne's rich and snooty cousin, Ronnie, makes an unannounced visit to Lanford. She reignites a long-simmering feud with Roseanne when she advises Darlene to leave home to pursue her dreams.

programme.title: Roseanne: Lose a Job, Winnebago
programme.desc: In her neighbors' motor home, Roseanne spearheads a trip to Hollywood where they all attend a taping of The Jackie Thomas Show. Meanwhile, Dan is determined to convince Roseanne to have another child.

programme.title: Roseanne: It's a Boy!
programme.desc: Darlene wants her boyfriend, David, to move in with the Conners. Roseanne is against the idea until she sees what David's home life is like. Now she has to convince Dan to let him stay.

programme.title: Roseanne: It Was Twenty Years Ago Today
programme.desc: Roseanne plans to set off some sparks by surprising Dan with a sexy boudoir photograph to mark their 20th wedding anniversary. But Dan's surprise gift to Roseanne results in major marital fireworks.

programme.title: Roseanne: Playing With Matches
programme.desc: Roseanne's mom makes a new friend, Jake, at the retirement home. Now, Roseanne's playing Cupid and Jackie's planning their wedding. With special guest Red Buttons.

programme.title: Roseanne: Promises, Promises
programme.desc: Darlene and David's youthful romance takes a complicated turn when she surprises him by renting a hotel room after their senior prom. Meanwhile, Roseanne and Dan decide to invest in a friend's business scheme.

programme.title: Roseanne: Glengarry, Glen Rosey
programme.desc: The old house Roseanne and Dan fixed up to sell languishes on the market after Roger abruptly skips town.

programme.title: Roseanne: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: Darlene must choose between David and her future when she gets accepted to a college for the arts in Chicago. Roseanne gets a visit from the new health inspector: her old boss Leon.

programme.title: Roseanne: Daughters and Other Strangers
programme.desc: Dan and Roseanne decide to let Darlene go to art school in Chicago, but will Darlene leave David to pursue her future? Meanwhile, at a birthday party, 'Seven Minutes in Heaven' turns DJ into a new man.

programme.title: Roseanne: Two Down, One to Go
programme.desc: Darlene is going away to college in Chicago and, as a result, Roseanne is faced with saying goodbye to another daughter. In the hope of keeping Darlene from moving, David makes a last minute attempt and proposes marriage.

programme.title: Roseanne: The Mommy's Curse
programme.desc: Jackie agrees to date Dan's co-worker, Fred, if Roseanne agrees to fire Bev from working at the diner. The plan backfires when Bev plans to sell her share of the diner to Leon.

programme.title: Roseanne: Party Politics
programme.desc: Roseanne suspects that Darlene and DJ are teaming up against her. Fred attempts to win Jackie back.

programme.title: Roseanne: A Stash From the Past
programme.desc: The discovery of a mysterious cache of marijuana in the Conner household sparks a smoky chain of events -- leading Roseanne and Dan to the humorous realization that their days of 'rebellious youth' are over.

programme.title: Roseanne: Be My Baby
programme.desc: Roseanne wants another baby, but to everyone's surprise, Jackie breaks the news about being in a 'family way,' sending Roseanne into a swirl of activity preparing for Jackie's maternity.

programme.title: Roseanne: Halloween V
programme.desc: Dan pulls a Halloween trick on Nancy to convince her of his friendship.

programme.title: Roseanne: Homeward Bound
programme.desc: Roseanne is suspicious when David moves out of the Conner household upon Darlene's impromptu visit. DJ experiences puberty.

programme.title: Roseanne: Guilt by Imagination
programme.desc: Dan's old girlfriend drops by for a lunch date. Roseanne imagines some romantic fantasies of her own with Fabio.

programme.title: Roseanne: Homecoming
programme.desc: Becky and Mark return for the reunion of Dan's football team, but there's trouble afoot.

programme.title: Roseanne: Thanksgiving '93
programme.desc: In the middle of the Conners' Thanksgiving Day meal Nana reveals a dark family secret.

programme.title: Roseanne: The Driver's Seat

programme.title: River Monsters: Invisible Executioner
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade takes on Africa's wild Zambezi River to unmask an invisible predator that's dragging fisherman to their deaths.

programme.title: River Monsters: Pack of Teeth
programme.desc: In southern Africa there are rumours of a deadly fish that lurks unseen in the eerie waters of the Okavango.

programme.title: River Monsters: Legend of Loch Ness
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is on a mission to track down the famous monster of Loch Ness and to succeed where so many have failed. The journey takes him from the depths of Loch Ness to the volcanoes of Iceland, all in pursuit of the mother of all monsters.

programme.title: River Monsters: Deadliest Man-Eaters: Aquatic Maneaters of Africa
programme.desc: When a monstrous freshwater catch lurks in the waters of South Africa, Jeremy Wade is determined to capture it. Then, as many fishermen are dragged to their death on the wild Zambezi River, Wade is on a mission to have an up-close encounter.

programme.title: River Monsters: Mekong Mutilator
programme.desc: The Mekong River is well known for its monstrous fish. This time, Jeremy is drawn to the spot in Southeast Asia after reports of something that has sliced cleanly through a young man's testicle.

programme.title: River Monsters: Africa's Deadliest
programme.desc: Jeremy returns to Africa's Okavango Delta to investigate a pack-hunting carnivore blamed for mauling the victims of a capsized boat. This time, he decides to put on his dive gear and offer himself as live bait in croc-infested waters.

programme.title: River Monsters: Deadliest Man-Eaters: Killer Predators of the Amazon
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is determined to find two deadly Amazonian aquatic beasts. Rumors claim that a monster fish is responsible for swallowing men whole, while another is the culprit behind the Sobral Santos last voyage, claiming the lives of hundreds.

programme.title: River Monsters: Killer Snakehead
programme.desc: Angler, Jeremy Wade sets his sights on an aggressive far eastern predator that's now invading America's backyards. Accused of homicide and said to breathe air and crawl on land, the snakehead is a monster that sounds more like a gangster than a fish.

programme.title: River Monsters: Invisible Executioner
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade takes on Africa's wild Zambezi River to unmask an invisible predator that's dragging fisherman to their deaths.

programme.title: River Monsters: Pack of Teeth

programme.title: Too Cute!: Fuzzy Polar Puppies

programme.title: Too Cute!: Puppy Love
programme.desc: Raisin, a wrinkled Shar-Pei, guards his toys from siblings Peaches and Pancake.

programme.title: Too Cute! Pint-Sized: Puppy Giants

programme.title: Furever Home Family: Hannibal, MO

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Jekyll and Hyde Cat
programme.desc: Jackson works with a couple with a blind cat who's suffering from living in a chaotic environment. He then visits a Jekyl and Hyde cat, Jude, that's a darling during the day, but a nightmare at night.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Fluffy's Last Stand
programme.desc: A mother and daughter are being torn apart by their cat, Missy, who's determined to kill their other cat Fluffy. Jackson meets a tortie named Candy, who's beating up a nine-year-old because she isn't so sweet.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: My Pup From Hell
programme.desc: Jackson works with Sydney, a Bengal, who's welcoming his new stepmom and new pit bull brother into the family by spraying every piece of furniture in the house; an energetic cat, Stella, threatens to harm a toddler.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Lucifer the Cat
programme.desc: Jackson's in Jersey to help a single mom whose cat, Pickles, is terrifying her kids. The Cat Daddy works with Lucifer, a cat whose devilish food obsession and constant pursuit to eat just might cost him his life.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: My Therapy Cat Needs Therapy
programme.desc: Jackson has a tall order in Delaware helping a veteran with PTSD whose therapy cat, Salem, is stressing him out. The cat daddy deals with Bartholomew, a cat that's shredding the furniture and tearing up a marriage.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Guilt Stricken Guardian
programme.desc: Jackson needs to find a way to help a distressed Philly cat named Dale whose uncontrollable peeing is driving a wedge between his guardians. It proves nearly impossible for Jackson to get a guilt stricken guardian to stop feeding her diabetic cat Lasagna.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Jackson's Kit-Bits: Baby the Bully
programme.desc: Jackson meets bully cat, Baby, whose holding all the female cats hostage, causing them to hide in the bathroom. Jackson comes to the aid of an interior designer's couch destroying cats, one of which is shedding pounds on a hunger strike.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Jackson's Kit-Bits: Sister Smackdown
programme.desc: In Philadelphia, Jackson helps a cat named Charlee rebuild the confidence that her sister cat, Frankie, has nearly beaten out of her. The Cat Daddy must crack the case of a pee soaked apartment in order help a family with multiple cats.

programme.title: My Horror Story: It Follows

programme.title: My Horror Story: Home Sweet Hell

programme.title: My Horror Story: The Devil Inside
programme.desc: A man is horrified to learn he is the target of a biblical demon that will stop at nothing to possess his soul. A ghostly woman steps out of a young artist's dreams and into reality.

programme.title: My Horror Story: Run, Ghost Boy, Run
programme.desc: A college track star learns there are some things he can't run from when an evil entity attacks him in his dorm room. A security guard encounters a terrifying creature from Native American lore.

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle: The Haunted Cabin and Alaskan Giants
programme.desc: A young mother's idyllic Alaskan dream soon descends into a paranormal nightmare as she starts to suffer attacks by an unseen force. Recent sightings may prove that a Native American legend about a mysterious race of giants is true.

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle: The Alaskan Titanic
programme.desc: In 1918 the SS Princess Sophia was mysteriously drawn off course and smashed into a reef before sinking and killing all aboard near Juneau, Alaska. Experts seek answers to the cause of shipwreck as a ghost hunter attempts to contact her victims.

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle: The Alaskan Loch Ness Monster
programme.desc: A cryptozoologist investigates reports of a sea monster lurking beneath the icy waters of Alaska. He reviews startling eyewitness accounts and examines never-before-seen video evidence of the terrifying creature.

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle: The Hairyman of Port Chatham and Frozen in Ice
programme.desc: Seasoned Bigfoot hunters investigate whether a huge, ape-like beast is responsible for a string of disappearances and mutilations in the remote Alaskan wilderness. New evidence suggests woolly mammoths may have found safe haven in Alaska.

programme.title: The Alaska Triangle: Alaska's Most Haunted Building and Curse of the Kushtaka
programme.desc: An aggressive spirit attacks guests at a historic hotel in Juneau, Alaska, and a shapeshifting menace could be responsible for thousands of abductions in the Alaska Triangle.

programme.title: Unexplained: Caught on Camera: Hotel From Hell
programme.desc: A man's terrifying supernatural experiences in a hotel don't stop there, two women witness the spirit of a little boy playing a trick on them and a man makes the biggest mistake of his life when he opens a cursed box.

programme.title: Below Deck: 'I Said I Got It!'
programme.desc: Kate deals with Laura's insubordination after being told to 'check' herself. Ross is at his wits end with Rhylee's attitude after she confronts him once again about feeling like the low man on the totem pole.

programme.title: Below Deck: All That Glitters Isn't Gold
programme.desc: The Crew's wild evening out prompts a passionate, late-night tryst for Rhylee and Tyler, but there's trouble in paradise for Ashton and Laura. As the Team's eighth Charter begins, childhood insecurities resurface for Josiah.

programme.title: Below Deck: Shame Cocoon
programme.desc: Tyler asks out Rhylee on a date, Ashton and Laura's relationship grows stronger after their initial hiccups. The My Seanna crew welcomes the final Charter, who turns out to be more demanding than they had anticipated.

programme.title: Below Deck: Au Revior!
programme.desc: Adrian gets frustrated when his plan for a centerpiece filled with living sea creatures is nixed by Kate, Rhylee feels awkward around Tyler, while Laura and Ashton make plans for the future. The crew scrambles when Kate forgets the primary's birthday.

programme.title: 30 Rock: A One-Time Special
programme.desc: Liz Lemon, and Jack Donaghy reunite the TGS team to help Kenneth Parcell with an advertiser presentation.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Hawaii Love You So
programme.desc: Against Julie's wishes, Todd brings the family on their 20th anniversary trip to Hawaii. When Savannah and Lindsie are charged with watching Nanny Faye, they get more than they bargained for.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Don't Kale Yourself
programme.desc: Lindsie challenges Todd and Julie to change their unhealthy habits. When Chase gets his wisdom teeth removed, Todd takes advantage of his altered state of mind.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Todd's Not Dead
programme.desc: Todd faces up to his own mortality by making the entire family plan his funeral. Savannah drops the ball on her pageant queen duties, and has to get her hands dirty by working in a dog shelter.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Colon All Cards
programme.desc: Todd sets an appointment for Julie's colonoscopy but runs into trouble when she forces him to get one too. Faye's gambling gets out of hand, and Lindsie takes drastic measures to get her to quit.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: You Can't Handle the Truce
programme.desc: Lindsie sets up a lunch for Todd and Will so they can work out their differences. Meanwhile Savannah gives Grayson dating advice.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Review and Renew
programme.desc: Todd appoints himself director when he and the kids film a commercial for the Juice Bar. Meanwhile, Julie and Lea look into a new rejuvenation procedure.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Go Flip Yourself
programme.desc: Todd is forced to the rescue when Chase and Parker take on a house-flipping project. Then, when Todd's childhood friend and prankster-in-crime Bill comes to visit, Julie seeks solace with Savannah.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Message in a Bottle Rocket
programme.desc: Todd takes the family to a rustic resort for Independence Day, but gets mocked for his outdoor skills. Meanwhile, Chase and Parker become the source of major fireworks.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Crowning Around
programme.desc: The family visits Las Vegas to support Savannah in the Miss Teen USA Beauty Pageant. While there, Chase has to keep tabs on Nanny Faye's gambling addiction.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Pretty in Print
programme.desc: Todd and Savannah are both chosen to be part of a magazine's '25 Most Beautiful People of Nashville' issue. Meanwhile, Julie helps Chase prep for his real estate exam.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Don't Cry Over Cut Onions
programme.desc: Malia, Wes and Adam find themselves in uncharted emotional territory as news of their love triangle spreads below deck. The Oklahomans return as charter guests keeping the interior on their toes as they struggle to keep up with their demanding requests.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Mo' Onions, Mo' Problems
programme.desc: Malia and Adam share a romantic moment, but complications arise when she continues to flirt with Wes. The charter guests play dirty as they challenge the Sirocco crew to a relay race. Hannah and Adam butt heads again.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Flirting With Danger
programme.desc: When a hot bachelor charters the Sirocco, a smitten Hannah attempts to keep it professional. Wes struggles with his growing feelings for Malia as fireworks ignite between her and Adam. Bugsy and Hannah's relationship gets further strained.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: iCloudy With a Chance of Secrets
programme.desc: Wes declares his feelings for Malia, while her relationship with Adam takes a shocking turn. Max's girlfriend visits. And when Bugsy makes a startling discovery that Hannah has broken yachtie code, Hannah faces Captain Sandy.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Kissing Up
programme.desc: When Hannah and Adam continue to clash about the quality of his service, a frustrated Captain Sandy insists that Adam step up his game. Despite trying to keep their relationship professional, Wes and Malia share an intimate moment while on the job.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: The Dubrovnik Wedgie
programme.desc: When bad weather keeps Sirocco at port, the crew scrambles to keep a VIP charter broker and her friends happy. Wes announces his choice for lead deckhand, causing tension to erupt.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Swing Shift
programme.desc: Adam's wedgie prank goes awry, and Wes does everything he can to avoid Adam. A one day charter quickly feels like an eternity when a group of eccentric Texans board Sirocco and keep the demands flowing more than the drinks. Malia gets on Sandy's bad side.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Stew the Right Thing
programme.desc: Bugsy's frustration with Hannah reaches critical mass when she calls Hannah out for not pulling her weight. A former guest returns, flanked by six beautiful women who tests Bobby's willpower when he matches with one on a dating app.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Con-text Is Everything
programme.desc: The Sirocco crew struggles to resolve their complicated relationships before they go their separate ways. Bobby finally finds romance in Croatia, but tensions build between him and the primary guest when Bobby takes things too far.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Gruel and Unusual Punishment

programme.title: Bunk'd: It's a Blast!
