programme.title: Bermuda Triangle: The New Secrets
programme.desc: Using cutting-edge technology, experts investigate the truth behind the Bermuda triangle.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Pompeii's Gate to Hell
programme.desc: An eerie complex of underground tunnels snake beneath a volcano near the ruins of Pompeii, and some believe these passages were intended as a gateway to hell. New discoveries are revealing exactly why they were built, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Bermuda Triangle: The New Secrets
programme.desc: Using cutting-edge technology, experts investigate the truth behind the Bermuda triangle.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting on Plague Island
programme.desc: A strange complex of buildings on a remote tropical island was once home to a large seaside community, but today, locals avoid the area and claim that it's haunted. New discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Incident at Area 51
programme.desc: Near Area 51, a police convoy is filmed transporting an alien-looking craft in the dead of night. When strange beams of light are reported in Argentina, experts investigate if it's proof of a terrifying Nazi superweapon.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of Osiris
programme.desc: A camera captures a person inexplicably bursting into flames. An ancient statue at a museum appears to come to life at night. An alien-like creature is filmed in the sewers. Eerie lights caught on camera may explain a mysterious death.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Return of the Witch
programme.desc: When something strange is recorded flying in Mexico, some wonder if it's a witch reputed to kidnap children, and others believe it's evidence of a new way to smuggle drugs or a top-secret technology.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Devil's Mutant
programme.desc: In Egypt, a freakish animal is caught on camera, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if this strange beast could explain the secrets of a satanic deity that was once believed to have been worshiped here.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Nuclear Demon Mummy
programme.desc: When a strange, dried-out creature washes ashore downriver from a nuclear power plant, some experts suspect it's the mummified corpse of a mutant; using the latest science and tech, this incredible theory is put to the test.

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: Investigations into strange occurrences caught on camera.

programme.title: Open Source Money: Home on the Range
programme.desc: Patrick Byrne and Overstock face SEC scrutiny costing millions. Dragonchain partners face attack by the US govt and with an uncertain future in US they leave or shut down. Wyoming takes the lead to keep US in the fight for the future of digital money.

programme.title: How It's Made: Wood Burning Stoves, Orthoses, Ballet Slippers, Mad Buses
programme.desc: A look at how wood burning stoves are made, how orthoses are created, how ballet slippers are manufactured and how mad buses are made.

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: Investigations into strange occurrences caught on camera.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: Are We Alone?
programme.desc: A team of experts use the latest science and cutting-edge technology to investigate if extraterrestrial life has contacted humankind, and what they discover could reveal if there's an international conspiracy to cover it all up.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: Mystery of Doomsday Jungle
programme.desc: When 400 earthquakes strike a remote jungle in Mexico over just two weeks, dozens of UFO sightings are reported nearby, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if this bizarre event is the smoking gun evidence of alien contact.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: Hunt for the Alien Relics
programme.desc: New clues suggest that aliens were in contact with the ancient cultures of Mesoamerica, and to prove it, a team of experts hunt down mysterious artifacts that could change everything we know about our place in the cosmos.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: The Volcano Enigma
programme.desc: New evidence points to a strange link between UFO sightings and volcanoes, and to test the explosive theory, a team of experts investigate one of the most mysterious mass reports of alien contact in history.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: Alien Crater of Doom
programme.desc: New discoveries of strange evidence in the forests of Argentina suggest an alien craft landed here, and to prove it, a team of experts use cutting edge technology to investigate the area and hunt down the truth.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Dangers of Success
programme.desc: As a prominent family awakens to noises in the night, their worst nightmare ensues when their beloved daughter Terri Ann McCoy is fatally shot. Investigators work through leads and lies to discover the perpetrators were closer than they realized.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Wicked Witness
programme.desc: What begins as a frantic 911 call to help an assaulted neighbor ends in the most bizarre investigation the small town of Walsenburg, Colorado has ever seen - complete with a twisted tale of torture, family secrets, and a fallen Jehovah's Witness.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Open Door Policy
programme.desc: The brutal murder of Mike and Terri Greene hits close to home in Grand Ledge, Michigan. The couple was beloved by everyone in the small town and Mike was a retired police officer. Evidence of a personal grudge, but could the motive so clear cut?

programme.title: 48 Hours on ID: NCIS: Heartless
programme.desc: Navy Lt. Lee Hartley fell mysteriously ill while serving aboard the USS Forrestal in the Mediterranean. Upon his death, an autopsy revealed the cause was acute arsenic poisoning.

programme.title: Betrayed: Killing with Kindness
programme.desc: Kind-hearted cashier Elizabeth Grosskopf scoops up human strays like puppies until one wants more than just food and shelter, but also her life.

programme.title: Betrayed: The Predator of Pleasant View
programme.desc: Suzy Goulart, 23, is just getting by like everybody else in the scrappy Pleasant View apartment complex, where little dramas between friends and lovers add up to Suzy's fiery murder.

programme.title: Betrayed: The Body in the Cornfield
programme.desc: Barbara Keim is juggling two ex-husbands and a rebellious teenage daughter with a questionable circle of friends. When Barbara goes missing, her sisters fear the worst.

programme.title: Betrayed: Beware the Au Pair
programme.desc: When Tara Lynn Grant, a 34-year-old mother of two goes missing, police can find no trace of her until a gruesome discovery turns the case into a statewide manhunt.

programme.title: Betrayed: Keep Your Friends Close…
programme.desc: 32-year-old Anna Lisa Raymundo seems to have it all a skyrocketing career, a beautiful home and a loving boyfriend. But a secret betrayal cuts her dreams of a family short.

programme.title: Betrayed: Deadly Crush
programme.desc: 25-year-old Corey Parker is looking for fun and sun when she moves to the beach side town of Jacksonville, Florida. But someone in her new circle of friends has murderous intent that will end her life.

programme.title: 48 Hours on ID: NCIS: Heartless
programme.desc: Navy Lt. Lee Hartley fell mysteriously ill while serving aboard the USS Forrestal in the Mediterranean. Upon his death, an autopsy revealed the cause was acute arsenic poisoning.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Memorial Day Murder
programme.desc: Chris Northam is an entrepreneur building his extreme sports business in the suburb of Roseville, California. When he is fatally gunned down in his warehouse, detectives look to his disgruntled employees and his mistress in search of the killer.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: The Thanksgiving Ambush
programme.desc: Rob and Brenda Andrew are a devout couple, living in the Bible Belt of Oklahoma City. But their world is shattered when both of them are shot during a violent home invasion. The mastermind will prove to be closer than anyone ever imagined.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: The Lieutenant of Lampson Road
programme.desc: When a firefighter is gunned down in his driveway, everyone in his life becomes a prime suspect.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Maine Murder Mystery
programme.desc: Mike and Valerie Miller are a beloved couple in the tiny town of Webster Plantation, Maine. When they are found shot dead in their own home, authorities must probe a list of suspects that includes their own flesh and blood.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Nightmare on Oak Hollow Drive
programme.desc: Etta Jean Westbrook is a long-time resident in a quiet suburb in Bryan, Texas. When she is found dead inside her home, detectives question her loved ones and canvass the neighbourhood in order to catch the killer before they strike again.

programme.title: Dead Reckoning: Murder in the Park
programme.desc: 19 year-old single mother, Cheyenne Clough is brutally assaulted and left in a secluded park to die. As police unlock the secrets of her life, they discover a trail of blind loyalty and deadly betrayal may have led to her murder.

programme.title: Dead Reckoning: Hidden Evil
programme.desc: 27 year-old beauty, Sherri Jackson has vanished leaving behind a blood smeared apartment. As investigators launch a frantic search for Sherri, they discover she was harboring a dark and violent secret that may have gotten her killed.

programme.title: Dead Reckoning: A Killer Unveiled
programme.desc: September 9, 2002. Husband and father, Tom Bragg, is found brutally murdered. A kind and well-liked man, his community struggles to think who wanted him dead. But when police take a closer look at his life and relationships, a deadly picture emerges.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Jeffrey MacDonald: The Accused
programme.desc: An army surgeon, Jeffrey MacDonald, is the lone survivor of a brutal 1970 home invasion that claims the lives of his wife and daughters. But authorities doubt his story of murderous hippies and believe MacDonald is the culprit.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Murder On Newberry St.
programme.desc: In 1969 race riots in York, PA, claim two lives - an African-American mother of two and a young, white police officer. Their deaths are largely forgotten until 30 years later, when their cold cases are reopened, revealing the city's dark past.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: A Killing in Chinatown
programme.desc: Art imitates life when Cambodian genocide survivor Dr. Haing Ngor wins an Oscar for his role in the film The Killing Fields. But when he's gunned down the LAPD investigate a web of political intrigue, revenge and street gangs to uncover the truth.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Freeway Phantom
programme.desc: In 1971 and '72, Washington DC is terrorized by a cunning killer who abducts and murders six young African American girls. Police and the community are outraged by the serial killings that target young children in their own neighborhoods.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Deadly Business
programme.desc: Robert Henry, an exec in Tacoma, was murdered in 1995 by a masked gunman. His wife tells the Police she thought he was killed by a former business associate. Det. Yerbury investigated and pieced together the evidence that convicted Larry Shandola.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Stalin: Russia's Steel Tyrant
programme.desc: For 30 years, Joseph Stalin rules the Soviet Union with an iron fist. Anyone who stands in his way will be destroyed.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Papa Doc: Haiti's President for Life
programme.desc: Francois Duvalier trained as a medical doctor, but his healing touch was lost as he became the ruthless dictator 'Papa Doc.' The tools of his tyranny were violence and Voodoo. He killed 30,000 people, and kept a nation in fear of his mystical powers.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT a Handsome Face
programme.desc: Steven Ray Milam is addicted to robbing banks. After a string of heists, he's dubbed the Handsome Guy Bandit, thanks to a clever disguise. But his pride and a costly mistake put the FBI on his trail. He's forced to leave his family and go on the run.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Impersonate a Guard
programme.desc: Dennis Hope, a handsome and intelligent thief, pulls off a series of daring robberies and goes on the run while living a life of luxury. Commuting from Alabama to Memphis.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Hide in a Swamp
programme.desc: Dominic Reddick flees prison and heads to Georgia. Someone calls the cops on him and he escapes to the woods. He eats donuts form the dumpster outside a shop, but to his surprise the cops are waiting inside.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Country Legend's Tour Bus
programme.desc: Christopher Gay is in jail for petty theft and known for his ability to escape. But on top of this, Gay is known for his choice in getaway vehicles. This cross-country chase is hardly a joy ride, as the cops are resolute on capturing him for good.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Shot Above a Deli
programme.desc: What was planned as an easy robbery turns into The Carnegie Deli Murders. Sean Salley shoots an actress and her friends above a deli in New York, and flees to New Orleans and then to Miami where he plans to leave the country for good.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Close Quarter Battle
programme.desc: Explore the chosen weapons when engaging the enemy at short range. The decision could mean the difference between life and death.

programme.desc: 36 U.S Special Forces face a Taliban insurgence 5 times their size. Facing I.E.Ds , RPG's and vicious counter attacks, they fight for their lives to take the hill of Sperwan Ghar, as control of the hill is control of Kandahar.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Old Is New Again

programme.title: Carnivorous: Smoke and Soul and Rock and Roll

programme.desc: Courtney gets her hands on some hot chicken and French toast in Nashville and a duck fat hot dog in Chicago. Next, she scores a surf-and-turf po' boy sandwich from a classic neighbourhood hangout in New Orleans.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Outdoor Kitchens
programme.desc: Roger Mooking tames the flames in outdoor kitchens fueled by wood-burning fires. In Solvang, Calif., the Alisal Guest Ranch and Resort is home to 10,000 acres of land with horses, cattle and a bevy of fiery cooking contraptions.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Weekend BBQs
programme.desc: Roger visits two Southern California barbeque joints that serve smoked meat specialties on weekends.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fishing For Fire
programme.desc: In a pit, under a kettle, or in between hunks of heavy metal, Roger's showing off three flame-licking good feasts that are packing high heat.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Women Fire Food
programme.desc: Roger Mooking salutes the country's most impressive and creative female pitmasters, learning a few new roasting methods along the way.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Taste of Texas
programme.desc: The smoke signals lead Roger to two popular food trucks in Texas serving up delicious ethnic eats. In Grapevine, Texas, Roger meets Pit Master Trey Sánchez of Vaqueros Bar-B-Q who is known for combining authentic Texas-style barbecue with Mexican dishes.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat Mania
programme.desc: It's a carnivore extravagance as Roger Mooking visits pitmasters cooking meat in massive quantities.

programme.title: Tom & Jerry

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Double Doggie Dare!/ Empire State of Mind
programme.desc: When a trip to the Empire State Building is cancelled, Bob signs up for a game show; The pugs want to bring the Empire State Building to Bob.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Night Flight/ Slippery When Wet

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Star Comes to Earth/ Party With a Pony
programme.desc: Fun-loving magical teen princess, Star Butterfly, who after a few skirmishes with other-worldly monsters, is sent by her Royal Parents to live with the Diaz family on Earth, bringing along her own unique inter-dimensional style to her new planet.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Matchmaker/ School Spirit
programme.desc: In an effort to get a better grade on her math test, Star offers to help her teacher Miss Skullnick with her love life but accidentally turns her into a troll. Star sets booby traps to protect the football team.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Monster Arm/ The Other Exchange Student
programme.desc: When Marco breaks his arm before a big karate tournament, Star tries to fix it with magic but accidentally turns it into a giant tentacle. The Diazes are visited by their charming former exchange student Gustav, and Star quickly becomes jealous.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Cheer Up Star/ Quest Buy
programme.desc: When Star is having a bad day, Marco comes up with a plan to cheer her up. Later, they venture to Quest Bay to purchase a new wand charger before Star's wand dies.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Diaz Family Vacation/ Brittney's Party
programme.desc: After inviting the Diaz's on a trip to Mewni as a last minute anniversary present, Star and Marco must save them from a many-headed serpent. Star must fight off Ludo and his army of monsters when they crash Brittney Wong's birthday party.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Mewberty/ Pixtopia
programme.desc: Marco and his friends run up Star’s Magic Mirror bill with prank phone calls, so they all travel to a dimension of pixies to pay it off. Star starts sprouting hearts all over her body, the telltale sign of Mewberty.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Lobster Claws/ Sleep Spells
programme.desc: Ludo fires one of his minions, Lobster Claws, so Marco and Star help him adjust to life on Earth. Marco uses psychology to help Star when she starts using magic in her sleep.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Blood Moon Ball/ Fortune Cookies
programme.desc: Star accepts her ex-boyfriend Tom's invitation to Demon Prom, but Marco is suspicious of Tom's intentions and crashes the prom to prevent Star from getting her heart broken again.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Freeze Day/ Royal Pain
programme.desc: Star accidentally freezes time with her wand, so she and Marco must travel to the Plains of Time to convince Father Time to get back on his time wheel.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Diaz Family Vacation/ Brittney's Party
programme.desc: After inviting the Diaz's on a trip to Mewni as a last minute anniversary present, Star and Marco must save them from a many-headed serpent. Star must fight off Ludo and his army of monsters when they crash Brittney Wong's birthday party.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: St. Olga's Reform School for Wayward Princesses
programme.desc: To give Pony Head a good birthday, Star must face her greatest fear - going to St. Olga’s Reform School for Wayward Princesses, to bust her out. Once there, Star and Marco find the school is even worse than they thought and their plan won't be easy.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Mewnipendance Day/ The Banagic Incident
programme.desc: Star leads a battle re-enactment as part of a Mewni Independence Day celebration with her friends on Earth. Then, Star sees a commercial for a magical Earth product and sets off on her own to buy it.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Interdimensional Field Trip/ Marco Grows a Beard
programme.desc: Star leads a class field trip to a museum in another dimension and puts the entire class in danger. Then, when Star flubs the spell used to help Marco grow a beard, the beard grows out of control and engulfs the house.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Storm the Castle
programme.desc: When Marco is captured by Toffee and held for wand-ransom, Star enters into an unlikely alliance with Ludo and Buff Frog.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: My New Wand!/ Ludo in the Wild
programme.desc: Star has to free Marco from a magically locked closet without her new wand. Ludo is thrown into nature and must overcome the elements and creatures of the wilderness to survive.

programme.title: Marty & McGee
programme.desc: Popular radio personalities Marty and McGee meet at the crossroads of southern culture and college football.

programme.title: Best of Marty & Mcgee's Show And Tell
programme.desc: A compilation of the duo's segments from the past three months, as they peek into the lives of some of sports and entertainment's biggest names, including country music stars Kane Brown and Luke Combs, NASCAR's Jimmie Johnson and more.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Wuerfell's Way
programme.desc: Former Heisman Trophy winner Danny Wuerffel deals with the fallout from Hurricane Katrina's devastation and dedicates himself to charitable outreach in the years following the disaster.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part One: 1869-1932
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the Civil War, America's south is looking to put the past behind it, and finds one path in a growing cultural passion of the north: football. In December 1932, the Southeastern Conference is officially formed.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Two: 1933-1959
programme.desc: Multiple SEC schools claim national titles from the 1930s through the 1950s. In 1958, LSU won with star running back Billy Cannon leading the way, and a year later Cannon had epic game-winning punt return against powerhouse Ole Miss.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Three: 1960-1970
programme.desc: In the 1960s, Georgia Tech leaves the conference and the civil rights movement becomes embedded in the history and image of the region. Bear Bryant, hired in 1958, becomes the face of Alabama, and of SEC football.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Four: 1969-1979
programme.desc: As a new decade dawns, quarterbacks Archie Manning, Bert Jones and Condredge Holloway build memorable legacies. Bear Bryant begins a new run of dominance at Alabama, and the rise of television sports transforms the SEC.

programme.title: Perry Mason: Chapter Four
programme.desc: Mason and Strickland lean on Virgil, again, for extra-legal assistance.

programme.desc: A government agent and a former assassin work together to stop a genetically enhanced villain who intends to unleash a supervirus.

programme.title: Movie: In Bruges
programme.desc: Two hitmen become stuck in Bruges after a job and start to think of life in a new light.

programme.title: Movie: Michael Clayton
programme.desc: An attorney, the Fixer, comes across the biggest case in his career; however, it could produce disastrous results for those who are involved.

programme.title: Movie: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: A magazine columnist has a very unusual assignment and a quick deadline. She has to write a firsthand account of all the things women do to inadvertently drive men away and she's got to do it in 10 days. Now she's on a mission to find the right guy.

programme.title: Movie: Mr. and Mrs. Smith
programme.desc: John and Jane Smith are bored with their domestic life, but both lead a double life. They are deadly assassins, although neither knows about the other, and they are assigned to kill each other after they both miss their latest target.

programme.title: Movie: Godzilla: King of the Monsters
programme.desc: The agency Monarch battles the monsters known as Titans.

programme.title: Movie: Cast Away
programme.desc: The lone survivor of a plane crash adapts to life on a remote island. An escape plan proves successful, but after years away from his life he discovers that much has changed.

programme.title: Movie: After Truth: Disinformation and the Cost of Fake News
programme.desc: This documentary examines the rising phenomenon of 'fake news. in the U.S. and the impact that disinformation, conspiracy theories and false news stories have on the average citizen.

programme.title: Movie: John Q
programme.desc: A man holds a hospital ER hostage when his son is denied care due to a lack of insurance.

programme.title: Movie: Jersey Girl
programme.desc: A young father loses his career and his wife and must raise his daughter alone the best way that he can.

programme.title: Movie: The Good Liar
programme.desc: A conman targets a wealthy widow, but his scam turns into a game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: Perry Mason: Chapter Four
programme.desc: Mason and Strickland lean on Virgil, again, for extra-legal assistance.

programme.title: I'll Be Gone in the Dark: Rat in a Maze
programme.desc: In 1979, law enforcement is thrilled when the East Area Rapist (EAR) attacks abruptly stop in Northern California, but in reality, EAR has moved south to commit a number of gruesome murders in the Santa Barbara area.

programme.title: Movie: Bohemian Rhapsody
programme.desc: Singer and songwriter Freddie Mercury helps form the band Queen, but at the same time that his flamboyant stage presence and powerful vocals lead the group to new levels of stardom his tumultuous personal life begins to spiral out of control.

programme.title: Movie: Shaft
programme.desc: A cybersecurity expert investigates his friend's suspicious death.

programme.title: Movie: Joker
programme.desc: A troubled comedian in Gotham City descends into a life of unhinged criminality, and develops an alter-ego that comes to be known as The Joker.

programme.title: Movie: The Recruit
programme.desc: A mentor asks a talented young CIA trainee to help find a mole inside the agency.

programme.title: Movie: Hanna

programme.title: Showbiz Kids
programme.desc: This documentary follows the ups and downs of children working in show business, and features interviews from famous child actors of the past.

programme.title: Movie: Good Boys
programme.desc: A young boy is invited to his first kissing party, he asks his best friends to help him get ready, and along the way, they encounter mayhem and mischief.

programme.title: Movie: Aquaman
programme.desc: A man learns that he is the half-human, half-Atlantean heir to an undersea kingdom that is ruled by his half-brother who plans to wage a devastating war on the surface world, forcing him to become a leader and challenge his brother for the throne.

programme.title: Movie: Ford V. Ferrari
programme.desc: A designer and a race car driver try to build Ford a race car that can beat Ferrari at the 24 Hours of Le Mans in 1966.

programme.title: Movie: Back to the Future
programme.desc: A teenager roars back through time to 1955, where he meets his parents at a young age.

programme.title: Movie: The Upside
programme.desc: After his wife and children are killed in a horrific accident, a grieving scientist turns to human cloning and cutting-edge robotics to bring them back to life in a series of unethical experiments that have far-reaching and unforeseen consequences.

programme.desc: Vampires plot their survival as they face a dwindling supply of human blood. Meanwhile, a rogue group of vampires and a scientist work to save humankind.

programme.title: Basketball County: In the Water
programme.desc: A fascinating examination of a remarkable community, this documentary tells the story of Prince George's County, Md., and its social, economic and cultural evolution through the lens of some of basketball's biggest stars.

programme.title: Movie: Locke

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Joy

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Voice From Beyond
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Ambition
programme.desc: A Seattle policeman’s home is destroyed by an arsonist. One month later, the officer arrests a low-level drug dealer, who confesses to the arson. But when the suspect vanishes, investigators begin to question the authenticity of his confession.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within a Hair
programme.desc: In the summer of 1996, four women from South Bend, Indiana were sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Evidence
programme.desc: A couple was murdered during what looked like a drug deal gone awry. But police found no drugs in the home of the victims and there were no traces of the victims' blood on the clothing of the suspects. The victim's dog eventually led police to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kill'igraphy
programme.desc: A man considered unstable by his neighbors is accused of killing his wife, but the medical examiner disagrees.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nursery Crimes
programme.desc: Medical investigators have no answers as to why children at a Texas hospital are dying at a higher rate than at any other hospital until they discover that one nurse seems to be on-duty in almost all the fatal cases.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Son of Sam: The Duke of Death
programme.desc: He is among the most infamous serial killers in American history. From 1976 to 1977, David Berkowitz terrorized New York City under his creepy self-given moniker: the Son of Sam.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Son of Sam: I Am A Monster
programme.desc: In 1977, the city of New York was being stalked by a seemingly faceless serial killer known as, 'Son of Sam.' But after his final shooting took him to Brooklyn, a twist of fate and a little luck led to his capture.

programme.title: Very Scary People: John Wayne Gacy: Evil Secret
programme.desc: This is the shocking and gruesome mystery of John Wayne Gacy, a popular Chicago businessman and part-time clown who was leading a double life in the 1970s. By day he was a community leader and by night a predator of young men.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bio-Attack
programme.desc: A religious cult's bizarre plot to overthrow the government using germ warfare.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: A woman is found dead of a gunshot wound and police conclude that she was murdered by her husband. Forensic scientists were able to piece together the clues and determine what really happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Slippery Motives
programme.desc: While staying at a hotel in St. Louis, Missouri, a Louisiana woman drowns in a bathtub. Her husband claims it was an accident, but detectives are skeptical as they discover evidence of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Deceit
programme.desc: Women in a small Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who becomes so experienced he leaves no clues to his identity. But computer technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool: geographical profiling.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scout's Honor
programme.desc: Police determine that the human remains found in a discarded box belong to one Edna Posey. But to find out whether the man accused of the crime is guilty, investigators turn to insects and the forensic entomologist who can interpret their behavior.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Touching Recollection
programme.desc: An eighteen-year-old girl is abducted at gunpoint from her home in Jackson, Ohio. Fortunately the victim returns hours later, and police hope the tire impressions and shoe prints at the crime scene will enable them to find the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Voice From Beyond
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier.

programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Son of Sam: I Am A Monster
programme.desc: In 1977, the city of New York was being stalked by a seemingly faceless serial killer known as, 'Son of Sam.' But after his final shooting took him to Brooklyn, a twist of fate and a little luck led to his capture.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Prayer
programme.desc: Madalyn Murray O'Hair and her two top lieutenants disappeared with no shortage of suspects. Her abduction may never have been solved if it weren't for the discovery of a headless, handless body, and the serial number on an artificial hip.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clutch of Witnesses
programme.desc: Two eyewitnesses see a truck intentionally drive over a sleeping man outside a motorcycle gang's clubhouse. During the investigation the witnesses, the truck, and the body disappear, leaving police just one clue: a bloodstain in the snow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dew Process
programme.desc: The wife of a well-known dentist is found dead, and her husband injured. Investigators use some fibres and a study of local weather patters the night of the murder to catch the guilty party.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Woman Scorned
programme.desc: When a young mother and her infant son are found dead in a cornfield, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But some insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue, as does a long, blonde hair found on the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bitter Pill to Swallow
programme.desc: A pregnant woman experiences severe morning sickness and suspects something is amiss.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sip of Sins
programme.desc: Faryion Wardrip seemed like the model citizen to most, but he was also a brutal serial killer who, for years, eluded police without suspicion. But smart police work and DNA from a discarded paper cup proved to be Wardrip's undoing.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: Some of the world's most incredible engineering projects are now deserted.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: American Atlantis
programme.desc: An abandoned town in the Nevada desert are the ruins of an American Atlantis, destroyed by catastrophic floods when the Hoover Dam was built. Today, experts investigate the secrets of this eerie ghost town as water levels recede and the city re-emerges.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Kingdom of the Vanished
programme.desc: A mysterious town in the hills of South Africa was once a booming community, but today, the eerie place is deserted. Experts reveal the cataclysm that caused the people of this once-prosperous town to suddenly leave and never come back.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Left Behind
programme.desc: A haunted prison that once housed America's most notorious criminals, now holds only ghostly secrets. New discoveries at the ruins of a massive industrial operation and at an island's abandoned complex reveal dark and gruesome histories.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Wild West Apocalypse
programme.desc: Some of the world's most incredible engineering projects are now deserted. Explore what happened to a massive military site that was once a hotbed for nuclear testing, a top secret airbase hidden inside a mountain, and an otherworldly power plant.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Wonders of the Underworld
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal various deserted, underworld engineering projects: from a terrifying sea fortress to a strange complex of towers in a forest of ice. Experts explain why they were built and why they were eventually abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of the Haunted Prison
programme.desc: A mysterious American pyramid built out of Cold War paranoia, a haunted prison, and a strange cluster of structures in the Atlantic are mysterious deserted engineering projects are investigated.

programme.title: Rameses: Wrath of God or Man?
programme.desc: A team of international scientists and forensic archaeologists, led by Egyptologist Professor Kent Weeks, unravel the mystery that links the Old Testament, Egypt's Pharaoh Rameses the Great and a skull found in the largest tomb ever unearthed in Egypt.

programme.title: Seasons on the Fly: Belize - Permit Alley
Destroyed in Seconds
programme.desc: An illegal propane plant explodes in a series of fireballs. Three people and a boat are sucked under a ferry. A dragster disintegrates at 130 mph. An ammunitions dump ignites, and a race boat flips and crashes.

programme.title: Local Knowledge: Cabin Fever
programme.desc: Ali and Rush each grab a friend and head to the water to relieve cabin fever of the pandemic lockdown.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Fire of the Gods
programme.desc: Josh Gates explores places where destruction and creation exist in breathtaking concert, from the legendary Chernobyl nuclear power plant in Ukraine to a Spanish festival that culminates with a citywide inferno.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Georgia Mountain Treehouse
programme.desc: A couple sets out to create their dream treehouse retreat in Northern Georgia overlooking the Blue Ridge Mountains. Although the build calls for a mile-long, uphill trek with their materials, the end result is the ultimate childhood dream come true.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Ozark Mountain Lodge
programme.desc: An adventurous couple builds a home with self-sustaining features near the Ozark National Forest. While they both have renovation experience, building on the dangerous mountainside terrain in a location plagued by flash foods will be a challenge.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Woodland Expedition
programme.desc: A young man is designing his first home on family land in rural Illinois to be off the grid and on the go. He and his buddy combine their experience as long-distance travelers to improvise their build through a Midwest winter.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Floating Castle
programme.desc: Marine scientists in Florida hire engineers Nicolas Derouin and Arnaud Luguet to create a first-of-its-kind floating home. They have nine months to complete it, but unpredictable weather and building hiccups may sink this project before it can swim.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Big Sur Modern Retreat
programme.desc: A nature-loving architect builds a modern California cabin that rivals the views of nearby Big Sur!

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Modern Farmhouse
programme.desc: A family builds an ultra-modern farmhouse completely off the grid in the verdant Wisconsin countryside. When the project extends into winter, they're pushed to the breaking point as they face the impact of extreme cold on the build and themselves.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Piney Woods Place
programme.desc: Cat Taylor constructs a remote sanctuary for her and her husband in the woods of Northwest Texas. The two-story home is made from sand, clay and straw.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Hell or High Water
programme.desc: A special ops vet teams up with a single mom to fight torrential rains, flash floods and sickness in Thailand's Sai Rung River Valley. It's a race against time as the pair puts their skills to the test before the river leaves them stranded from the crew.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Fear the Unknown
programme.desc: A bigfoot believer who is afraid of the dark and a tough mom who has never left home take on the dark and mysterious Mayan jungles of Belize.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Dad's Being a Dadzilla

programme.desc: Southern bride Danielle gets some help from her girlfriends in the quest to find the perfect glamorous gown. Jen is having a beer-themed wedding, but wants her dress to be more traditional. Katie worries her large assets won't fit in her wedding gown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: What Does Martha Think?
programme.desc: The wedding guru herself, Martha Stewart, visits Kleinfeld. She's helping bride Bailey decide if she truly chose her perfect dress. Meanwhile, bride Jessica is so indecisive she may not find a gown, and Crystal wants impossible alterations.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: This Is Your Day
programme.desc: War veteran and bride-to-be Alicia has served in both Iraq and Afghanistan. Now, it's Randy's turn to give back to her by surprising this shocked bride with a VIP day at Kleinfeld. The surprises keep getting bigger and better all day long.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I'm a Legacy
programme.desc: Joelle tries on her mother's 1987 Kleinfeld dress, but is not sure if she is ready to walk down the aisle '80s style. Randy and Antonella know it's going to be a rough appointment when bride LeAnne declares she's the ultimate anti-bride!

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: You ARE a Daredevil!
programme.desc: Paralympic snowboarder Amy Purdy isn't afraid to take risks, like waiting to find her dress just three weeks before the big day. Katie is the ultimate planner and brings a list ranking her top gowns.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Say Yes to the Dress at Home
programme.desc: The COVID-19 pandemic has turned the bridal industry upside down, forcing Kleinfeld to temporarily shut its doors. During the shutdown, brides continue to email Randy and the Kleinfeld family, and these are some of their stories.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Birthday Surprise
programme.desc: Bachelor alum Caila found her real-life prince charming, but to find her fairy-tale gown she must listen to her heart. Ridicule for her love of feathers has Jocelyn heartbroken and her consultant scrambling. Plus, a birthday surprise is in the works.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I Wanna Be Naked
programme.desc: Alexis wants to look naked on her wedding day, and Courtney's last-minute indecision puts Randy to the test.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Tumor Takeover
programme.desc: Matt has a skin condition that causes tumors to grow all over his body. Yamileth hasn't pursued her dreams because of the lump on her neck. Pat is covered with dark spots from her neck to her abdomen. Jennifer has a unicorn bump on her forehead.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Romancing the Lump
programme.desc: Heather has a huge growth on her leg and fears removing it could leave a keloid. Jesse and Nelda are siblings with matching and painful skin conditions. Margarita has a cluster of unsightly bumps behind her ear, and Paul has a giant hump on his back.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Adventures in Pimplepopping
programme.desc: Inoke has a huge, possibly life-threatening bulge on his shoulder. Delano returns with his back lump after Dr. Lee removed a liter of fluid from it. Reed has hundreds of bumps on his chest that burst and leave nasty scars.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Pop Ups: The Last Unicorn
programme.desc: Louis is a veteran who is covered in scaly, dry skin that makes him feel like an alligator. Irais's kids are bullied because of the embarrassing growth on her head. Johnny's been living with a stubborn lump on his back for too long.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Pop Ups: The Curious Case of the Pooting Cyst
programme.desc: Diane has thousands of tumors all over her body that she feels have ruined her life. Will worries his shoulder lump will be ripped open at work. Anthony's daughters force him to get a lump examined. Kal Elle detests her varicose veins.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Tyler and Taco
programme.desc: Tyler, the Creator and Loiter Squad co-star, Taco, visit the set of Ridiculousness and learn about Sloppy Finishes and Faceballs.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CXXXV
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel, and Sterling enforce the law with the 'pee pee PD,' golf the hard way in 'play it where it lies' and celebrate the art skills of pint-sized Piacassos.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Jordan Clarkson
programme.desc: Laker shooting guard Jordan Clarkson hangs out with Rob, Steelo and Chanel. They throw down Jammies, observe the Tongue Cam and learn about Gettin' Laked.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Nate Robinson
programme.desc: Professional basketball star Nate Robinson takes a look at some fellow sharpshooters, plays some supermarket sports, and joins in the celebration with the dunk cam.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Tyga II
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo and Chanel welcome rap superstar Tyga as they watch some people 'get a taste', witness what could go wrong when you 'make it haute' and find out what kind of talents can make you legendary'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CLXXII
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo celebrate Oktoberfest in 'lederhosed', welcome unexpected guests in 'don't answer', and experience some sweet and stern 'southern mother'n'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Post Malone
programme.desc: Rapper Post Malone joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo for some Really White Iversons, to mess things up with Saucin' On You and to present some Knuckle Tats.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: 21 Savage
programme.desc: Rapper 21 Savage introduces Rob, Chanel and Steelo to 'Savage Mode,' updates the dictionary with Word Birthers and provide a teachable moment about how anything potentially Issa Weapon.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Ryan Sheckler
programme.desc: Skateboarding pro Ryan Sheckler joins Rob to look at some heated sibling rivalries and show us how to avoid skateboard missiles.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CLXI
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo hand out 'Cap and Frowns', see what it's like to have 'Futbol Fever' and cool off some 'Lil' Smokies'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Lil Skies
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Lil Skies joins Rob, Steelo, and Chanel to meet some next level Shelbys, see the effects of sa-bro-tage, and get off the hook.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CIX
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel, and Steelo get spicy with "mouth arson," feel the pain of slaughter slides, and visit the cutest town ever.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sage the Gemini
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Sterling have rapper and producer Sage the Gemini on the show to find out if he's 'glide or die,' get 'over gassed' and announce to the world 'I love sparks.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CLIII
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel, and Steelo get bent out of shape in ‘hinge cringe’, get trapped in a ‘giggle prison’, and take a visit to the angriest place on earth, ‘swing city’.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: VMA Moments
programme.desc: On a special VMA episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Steelo pay tribute to the great VMA moments with some guitar-tossing Ax Wounds, butt-baring Moon People, and unreal Cardi babies.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Machine Gun Kelly II
programme.desc: Rapper and actor Machine Gun Kelly joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to get down and dirty, and compete in the "Drunkathlon."

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Anderson .Paak
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo and Chanel welcome Grammy-winning artist Anderson .Paak to check out some 'social slams', celebrate people with 'signature smiles', and party down at some 'wild weddings'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling LXXIV
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo find some people who take "Ghosting" to another level, discuss the best time to just "Take the L" and watch some people get burnt in "Fire Drilled."

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Smosh
programme.desc: YouTube stars Smosh expose some 'secret commandos,' showcase the hilarity of getting 'shut up' and help highlight 'why men shouldn't twerk.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling XLII
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo learn a new game called 'traffic tag,' receive some 'dick tips' and things get messy when they 'pop the man-pagne.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Terrence J
programme.desc: The host of MTV's 'Safeword' and 'Are You The One,' Terrence J, joins Rob, Steelo.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling XLIV
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo dive head first into some dead pools, go into carrot shock and learn a valuable life lesson that everything farts.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Jackson Nicoll

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Adam Rippon
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo are joined by Olympic figure skater Adam Rippon to swipe right on the animal dating app Whiskr, let it all out in 'Soul Scream,' and keep the streets clean with 'Face Moppers.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Lil Duval

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling XXXVIII
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Sterling discuss the drunk ingenuity of 'Drinkovators,' explore the bizarre 'Planet of the Vapes' and test their palates for destruction in the 'Taste of Death.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Lyndie Greenwood
programme.desc: 'Sleepy Hollow's' Lyndie Greenwood joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to check out some terrifying 'everyday demons,' and laugh at some hilarious hockey 'puck ups.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling XXXII
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Sterling enjoy some 'white whines,' attend an 'animals anonymous' meeting and take a trip to the most dangerous suburb in the country 'slamburbia.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: 100th
programme.desc: Rob, Sterling and Chanel celebrate the 100th episode of Ridiculousness by getting 'popcorned,' trying not to catch 'heavy leg syndrome,' and having some good old-fashioned 'redneck good times.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CLVIII
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel, and Steelo take sexy to the extreme in '50 shades of cray', get zero help in 'service with a shrug' and check out the heartland in 'jolly ranchers'.

programme.desc: Rob, Sterling and Chanel go 'flame dumb,' test out their hand skills in 'snatch masters' and slow-mo man's best friend in 'goooodddd booooyyyy.'

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A naive entrepreneur with high hopes for her kitchen accessory enters the 'Shark Tank' unprepared. The desire of a father and son who want to control their own business might jeopardize their opportunity to make a fortune.

programme.desc: A professional body builder from Henderson, Nevada, demonstrates his incredible strength as well as a unique cooler that keeps multiple drinks separated inside one cold container.

programme.desc: When Ronnie Anne discovers that each family member will perform at Hector's birthday, she turns to Sid for help. Ronnie Anne's attempts to bond with her cool older cousin Carlota lead to a prank war against the boy cousins.

programme.title: The Loud House: Intern for the Worse/ The Old and the Restless
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde both get an internship at Flip's and compete to win the manager title. When Lincoln sees how tame Pop Pop has gotten in his older age, he takes him out for a day to remember.

programme.title: The Loud House: Washed Up/ Recipe for Disaster

programme.title: The Loud House: Stall Monitor/ A Pimple Plan
programme.desc: Worried that his teacher has bad things to say about him, Lincoln tries to delay his parent-teacher conference. Luan wakes up with a pimple on the day of her first date with Benny, so she turns to the siblings for help.

programme.title: The Loud House: Exchange of Heart/ Community Disservice
programme.desc: Clyde arranges for an exchange student to stay with them; Lola takes a timid classmate under her wing.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Boss for a Day/ Pineapple RV
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs has an accident and leaves SpongeBob in charge of the Krusty Krab. SpongeBob and Patrick turn the pineapple into a mobile home to take Squidward on the road trip he deserves.

programme.title: Young Dylan: Teachable Moments
programme.desc: Rebecca is being bullied online, prompting Dylan to encourage Martin to respond to some of the posts. His posts are not anonymous, and the family must deal with the fallout.

programme.title: Nickelodeon's Unfiltered
programme.desc: Celebrities hide behind animated characters, and it's up to a panel to guess who it is.

programme.title: All That
programme.desc: A mermaid and a merman reveal things they've found from the surface. Fuzzoli and Smile investigate the case of the food fight.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Welcome to Chum Bucket/ Frankendoodle
programme.desc: Mr. Krab loses SpongeBob's fry cook contract in a bet with Plankton and SpongeBob is forced to go work at the Chum Bucket; When SpongeBob and Pat discover a pencil from the surface, they begin to draw with it and everything they draw comes to life.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Secret Closet
programme.desc: Joey dreams about being with Rachel and betraying Ross; Chandler finds a secret closet.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Joey Tells Rachel
programme.desc: A guilt-ridden Joey finally fesses up to a speechless Ross about his feelings for Rachel.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Tea Leaves
programme.desc: Rachel hopes to restore her fallen relationship with Joey by conjuring up a big lie.

programme.title: Friends: The One in Massapequa
programme.desc: Monica regrets volunteering to give a toast at her parents' 35th wedding anniversary.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Joey's Interview
programme.desc: Joey is thrilled when his name is used as a clue in Soap Opera Digest's crossword puzzle.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Baby Shower
programme.desc: Rachel panics during her baby shower when she realizes she is unprepared for motherhood.

programme.title: Mom: Sparkling Water and Ba-Dinkers
programme.desc: Bonnie fears she's become undesirable when she catches Adam smoking pot before sex and Christy tries to smooth things between them.

programme.title: Mom: Curious George and the Big Red Nightmare
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie worry that Roscoe has a drug problem when Baxter and Candance catch him smoking pot.

programme.title: Mom: Blow and a Free McMuffin
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie rush to a sick Violet's side, only to find out that having mono is the least of her worries.

programme.title: Mom: Xanax and a Baby Duck
programme.desc: An overprotective Christy keeps a constant eye on her 12-year-old son, after discovering he has been using drugs and alcohol and Bonnie finds herself in the strange position of being the calm and rational one.

programme.title: George Lopez: Sk8r Boyz
programme.desc: Max gets in trouble with the law when he starts hanging out with a gang of skateboarders.

programme.title: George Lopez: E.I.? E.I. OH
programme.desc: When Powers Aviation merges with another company, George is forced to share his territory.

programme.title: Full House: Jesse's Girl
programme.desc: Jesse's dream girl turns into a nightmare when she dumps him for Joey.

programme.title: Full House: Joey's Place
programme.desc: Joey thinks the family can't get along without him when he prepares for a comedy tour.

programme.title: Full House: The Big Three-O
programme.desc: Danny crashes his surprise 30th birthday party and discovers his car is in the bay.

programme.title: Full House: Our Very First Promo
programme.desc: The Tanner family is chosen to appear in a local promotion for Danny's TV station.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Help Wanted/ Reef Blowers/ Tea at the Treedome
programme.desc: Bob applies at the Krusty Krab; a mess ends up on Squidward's lawn; meeting Sandy for tea.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shuffleboarding/ Prefessor Squidward
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick get carried away when they fill in for Mermaidman and Barnacleboy. Squidward poses as the teacher at a prestigious music school. But SpongeBob and Patrick show up and nearly blow his cover.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Club SpongeBob/ My Pretty Seahorse
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick build a small clubhouse and tell Squid he can't join. Spongebob finds a stray sea horse.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Someone's in the Kitchen With Sandy/ The Inside Job
programme.desc: Plankton steals Sandy's fur to disguise himself as Sandy and get the Krabby Patty formula. Plankton goes inside SpongeBob's head to get the Krabby Patty formula.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: Save Our Shores
programme.desc: A huge trash spill at the beach endangers the local wildlife; Scrozzle sets about finding reinforcements.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: All That Glitters/ Wishing You Well
programme.desc: SpongeBob's spatula breaks mid-patty flip; Mr. Krabs installs a wishing well near the Krusty Krab and sends SpongeBob down the well in a bucket to collect the coins.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: Daisy Chain Gang/ Backdraft to School
programme.desc: Fendrich organizes a charity as a distraction while he attempts to steal the city deed. Sinclair gathers antiheroes to stop him. Freya is one credit short of graduating from the fire academy and is suspended as Fire Chief.

programme.title: Movie: The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge Out of Water
programme.desc: When the secret recipe for krabby patties goes missing, SpongeBob and the gang venture onto dry land to get it back. The scent leads them to a pirate with a magic book, and the ocean-dwellers must transform themselves into superheroes to take him down.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Boss for a Day/ Pineapple RV
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs has an accident and leaves SpongeBob in charge of the Krusty Krab. SpongeBob and Patrick turn the pineapple into a mobile home to take Squidward on the road trip he deserves.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Wet Painters/ Krusty Krab Training Video
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs has SpongeBob and Patrick paint the inside of his house; training for employees.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Restraining SpongeBob/ Fiasco
programme.desc: Annoyed by Spongebob for the last time, Squidward issues him a restraining order. Plankton steals a Krabby Patty from the Krusty Krab unaware it's really an art piece by famous artist Fiasco.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: New Student Starfish/ Clams
programme.desc: Pat joins SpongeBob at boating school; Mr. Krabs takes Bob and Squid fishing.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: New Digs/ Krabs a la Mode
programme.desc: SpongeBob moves into the Krusty Krab and turns it into an ice skating rink.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mall Girl Pearl/ Two Thumbs Down
programme.desc: Pearl gets a job to be cool like her friends, but the only store that's hiring is the lamest store at the mall. SpongeBob loses the use of his thumbs, and must get them back in working order before his entire life falls apart.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Don't Look Now/ Séance Schméance
programme.desc: SpongeBob holds a séance at the Krusty Krab to learn the recipe for a long-lost sandwich. Then, SpongeBob and Patrick go to see the latest horror film, only to be seemingly stalked by the villain.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Slumber Party/ Grooming Gary
programme.desc: Mr. Krab's enlists SpongeBob's help to be an undercover spy at Pearl's slumber party.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Biddy Sitting/Jolly Lodgers
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick get tricked into babysitting a grouchy old lady, who does all she can to escape.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Pink Purloiner/ Squid Wood
programme.desc: Rejected by Squidward, SpongeBob decides to make his own Squid ventriloquist dummy.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Unreal Estate/ Code Yellow
programme.desc: When SpongeBob thinks he's allergic to his pineapple, Squidward offers to help find him a new home. Squidward is getting a nose job at the local hospital, and SpongeBob tags along as moral support.

programme.title: World's Deadliest Weather: Wildfire Devastation
programme.desc: Horrific wildfires devastate the seaside village of Mati in Greece, as a resident is trapped by the raging flames, and a mother battles to save her son. A day out at the Zoo ends in disaster as monster hail pummels tourists and animals in Colorado.

programme.title: World's Deadliest Weather: Run for Cover
programme.desc: As the deadliest wildfire in Californian history tears across the state, one man battles the flames single-handedly in a bid to save his home, while the US National Guard responds to the emergency.

programme.title: World's Deadliest Weather: Escaping Catastrophe
programme.desc: A deadly volcano eruption in Guatemala unleashes a searing hot mass of ash, lava and toxic fumes, leaving firefighters trapped in their vehicle and fighting for survival.

programme.title: World's Deadliest Weather: Superstorm Sandy
programme.desc: A brutal Hurricane named Sandy whips up wild waves in the Atlantic, prompting a daring rescue mission by the US Coast Guard.

programme.title: Weird Earth: Cloud Angels and Frog Devils

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripteased

programme.desc: Christian approaches Ana and asks her to give him a second chance. She agrees with one condition: this time, there isn't going to be any rules or punishments. They start to build trust, but figures from Christian's past threaten to tear them apart.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades Darker
programme.desc: Christian approaches Ana and asks her to give him a second chance. She agrees with one condition: this time, there isn't going to be any rules or punishments. They start to build trust, but figures from Christian's past threaten to tear them apart.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades Freed
programme.desc: Ana Steel and Christian Grey's fledgling marriage is threatened by jealously when his former lover works her way back into his life, but lurking beyond that is an even greater threat in the form of Ana's disgraced former employer who's out for revenge.

programme.title: Movie: Twilight
programme.desc: A teen yearning for belonging and understanding moves in with her father in Washington State. She soon falls in love with an enigmatic boy at school, who turns out to be a vampire. They find themselves drawn to each other despite their differences.

programme.title: Movie: The Twilight Saga: New Moon
programme.desc: After realizing that Bella would be safer with them out of the picture, the Cullen's leave town. Heartbroken, Bella turns to Jacob for comfort and friendship, but quickly learns that Jacob is keeping a secret of his own.

programme.title: Movie: The Twilight Saga: Eclipse
programme.desc: With her high school graduation coming up, a teenage girl must choose between her vampire boyfriend and her werewolf friend.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Restaurant Teams
programme.desc: Guy Fieri knows that there's nothing like the teamwork in a busy restaurant's kitchen, so he invites three teams of phenomenal chefs to represent their restaurants in Flavortown.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Culinary All-Stars
programme.desc: Guy's family loves cooking at home and great restaurant food, so they're combining the best of both worlds by firing up takeout with a twist. On the menu, there's tandoor chicken poutine and polenta flavour bomb, arancini and empandas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cruisin' the Italian Countryside
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's taking a tasty tour through Tuscany, Italy. In Montecatini Alto, a hillside seafood spot serves up a squid ink specialty and a Mediterranean prawn-artichoke mash up.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Grabbin' a Sandwich
programme.desc: Guy heads to Salt Lake City and samples meatball subs and Philly cheese steaks.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: You Picked 'Em
programme.desc: Revisiting favourites from past episodes such as the family restaurant in Oklahoma.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fast Food Their Way
programme.desc: In Honolulu, Hawaii, there is a 48-year-old drive-in where burgers and dogs come with rice and macaroni salad. In Nashville, Tenn., a Jamaican cafeteria at the farmer's market serves mango chutney chicken and curried goat.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pizza, Pork and Peru
programme.desc: On this trip Guy digs into killer grub like Michigan-made pizza pie and Philly sandwiches.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Funky Joints
programme.desc: Guy chases down some funky joints doing serious cooking.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fish, Fries and Feet
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's tackling everything from land to sea. In Des Moines, the funky fusion joint serving up unique burritos alongside off-the-chain bulgogi masa fries.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A Taste of Everywhere
programme.desc: Guy Fieri tracks down international dishes done Triple-D style: A combination Jamaican/Chinese joint in Florida; Home made Polish pierogi at a basic bar in Pittsburgh; and a Mexican restaurant in Utah where the specialty is seven kinds of mole.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Crepes to Kreplach
programme.desc: Guy finds a crepe joint stacking them 21-high in a butter rum caramel cake, and then a deli cooking stuffed cabbage and kreplach.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Totally Unexpected
programme.desc: Guy Fieri discovers great food in some unexpected places, including a bowling alley, a car wash and Laundromat in Austin and a historic neighbourhood grocery store in Atlanta with fried quail.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fillin' Up in Florence
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's hitting up totally traditional Italian spots in Florence, Italy. First, the 50-year-old landmark serving up their legendary spaghetti specialty and some crazy good chicken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Indulgent Dishes
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's indulging himself in righteous, rich recipes. In Charlotte, North Carolina, a crazy seafood spot is reelin' in off-the-hook gumbo and a spicy mahi specialty. Across town, a mother-daughter team is servin' up savoury lamb ragout.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: By Hand and By Fork
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's digging into dynamite dishes and grabbin' some outrageous grub.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Piggin' Out
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's going big on the pig. In Colorado Springs, a funky food truck serves its pork fusion on loaded platters and Central American arepas. In Minneapolis, an Asian joint tucked away in a grocery store dishes out barbecued pork.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: East-West Flavorfest
programme.desc: Washington D.C. serves dumplings and ramen. Atlantic City has a pizza parlor with cheeseburger and chicken vodka pizza. Also, roast beef and cinnamon rolls in Colorado Springs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Fried, Baked and Barbecued
programme.desc: Things are cookin' all kinds of ways in Flavortown. First, Guy Fieri checks in on a diner in San Diego where law enforcement hones their skills and stuffs their gills.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Coastal Cuisine
programme.desc: The sun is out and the surf is high as Guy Fieri hits up some ultimate DDD spots by the shore. First, he's in Honolulu to say 'Hi' to an old buddy who's reelin' in fresh poke and smokin' pork by the plateful.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Flavortown Favorites
programme.desc: Guy Fieri revisits some of the best of Flavortown, starting in San Diego, where an Asian-inspired noodle house is takin' over the neighborhood. In New Orleans, a neighborhood bistro bounces back from Hurricane Katrina.

programme.title: Giada at Home: Pizza and Pasta 101
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis and her daughter, Jade, love nothing more than a day at home making pizza and pasta. Together they make a Chicago-style deep dish cheese pizza plus summery spaghetti with lemon zucchini and lemon strawberry sundaes for dessert.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: The Savory Side Of Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay is whipping up a crowd-pleasing brunch of classically sweet dishes reimagined with savory flavors, like stuffed French toast with gruyere, mustard greens and double-smoked bacon, ham and cheese scones.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Fearless Food
programme.desc: Ina Garten is tackling daunting dishes with easy techniques, from a perfectly risen souffle a l'orange to overcoming pastry fears with her totally professional-looking Anna's tomato tart.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: My Kind Of Town: Chicago
programme.desc: One of Valerie Bertinelli's good friends is a recent Chicago transplant, living in Los Angeles but always extolling the virtues of his hometown eats. She invites him and some other Chi-town ex-locals over for a taste of their hometown.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Tasty Treats to Go
programme.desc: Ree cooks up her favorite tasty treats to share with people she loves. She makes pumpkin cinnamon rolls, baklava, and white chocolate shortbread.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Chicken in Bulk
programme.desc: Ree's hitting the marked on a major bulk buy trip and stocking up on chicken breasts, ready to turn into a fantastic cobb salad, a pan of skillet chicken lasagna, cool crisp Thai lettuce wraps and feel-good chicken rice soup.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Friendship Fiesta
programme.desc: Ree Drummond's daughter Alex and her best friends are heading to college, and while they have a dorm room craft day, Ree's cooking up a Tex-Mex feast with juicy marinated green chile chicken, spicy taco potatoes, and a layered Mexican salad.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home 9
programme.desc: Ree shares ideas for four family meals with help from her kid film crew. Ree's husband and his father drop by to share speedy mini sloppy joe sliders. Then Ree makes shortcut Hawaiian chicken bowls, meatless sheet pan gnocchi and lemon shrimp alfredo.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Hockey Game!
programme.desc: Molly Yeh and her husband, Nick, host a hockey party for their sports-loving friends. She makes all her favourites, including crispy fried chicken sandwiches with super-creamy chipotle mayo and homemade noodles.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Dinner and a Movie ... Outdoors
programme.desc: Valerie designs an Old Hollywood menu featuring brisket sliders with white barbecue sauce, horseradish potato salad and crunchy manchego.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Outdoor Dishes
programme.desc: Kardea Brown makes her favourite summertime dishes, including pimento cheese stuffed burgers, rotisserie chicken salad sandwiches, blackberry hand pies, sparkling summer lemonade and, to satisfy her sweet tooth, confetti whoopie pies.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: The Thrill of Pizza on a Grill
programme.desc: Cooking outdoors inspires Italian pizza magic as Michael Symon turns a standard grill into a pizza oven. He uses coals and cast iron pans to cook his homemade dough and produce the perfect crust for his Grilled White Pizza.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Sun's Out, Buns Out
programme.desc: The summer sun and buns are out, burger, sandwich and hot dog buns, that is. Geoffrey shares his tips for a moist and flavourful mushroom turkey burger while Katie makes a meatless grilled halloumi sandwich with watermelon relish.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Wicked Aisle Games
programme.desc: A flip of a coin determines whether the chefs can shop the odd or even aisles while making their sandwich and side. In the final round the chefs must make their steakhouse dinner using one ingredient per aisle.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: GGG Winning Teams
programme.desc: Guy Fieri brings back the winning teams of previous competitions for another battle of team supremacy. First, he has them shop without carts for their surf and turf ingredients.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Pasta La Vista, Baby
programme.desc: Four chefs must make a winning dish in a single aisle showdown. Next, it's all you can carry as the chefs grab ingredients for their barbecue feast with no carts.

programme.desc: When all of Peter's friends, family and co-workers pay attention to his new neighbour, an athletic police officer in a wheel chair, he becomes jealous.

programme.desc: Joe Pera reads the announcements at church.

programme.desc: In which Joe Pera and the school’s band teacher, Sarah Conner, put together a musical based on the Alberta Rat Control Program that has kept the Canadian province rat-free since 1950.

programme.title: Bakugan: Battle Planet: Here Comes Haavik/ The Fusion Bakugan Arrive
programme.desc: An evil shapeshifting alien has landed in Los Volmos! If that wasn’t bad enough, he has a group of robot mechanoids on his trail trying to bring him justice.

programme.title: Ben 10: Summer Breakers

programme.title: Ben 10: The Monsters in Your Head

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Dream/ The Sidekick
programme.desc: Gumball blames Darwin for kissing Penny in his dream which threatens their friendship.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Words/ The Apology
programme.desc: Darwin is too polite so Gumball teaches him to be direct through insults.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Web
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin give Nicole a crash course in computers.

programme.desc: Family values must remain strong when Batman and his team encounter the villainous Red Hood, who is obsessed with destroying the Bat-family and all of Gotham City.

programme.desc: Alan worries that Charlie's womanizing is getting out of control.

programme.desc: Charlie tries to resist temptation when he meets the grown daughter of the woman he's dating, and then realizes they've met before.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Taterhead Is Our Love Child
programme.desc: Charlie encounters an ex-girlfriend whose son looks an awful lot like him.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Best H.O. Money Can Buy
programme.desc: Alan tries to escape Judith's grasp as Charlie and Herb go on the prowl.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Pinocchio's Mouth
programme.desc: Charlie's new girlfriend asks him to spend the night at her place while Alan tries to enforce a punishment on Jake.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Cowardly Lyin'
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie try to be more open in their relationship after Doug is caught lying.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Driving Reign
programme.desc: When Doug helps Danny get promoted to driver at IPS, the two immediately start competing.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Clothes Encounter

programme.desc: Doug sees a chance to reclaim his privacy when he learns that Arthur inherited a house.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: A Whale of a Tale
